  29
  30def active_beam_with_settings(
  31    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
  32) -> tbt.Beam:
  33    """Beam factory
  34    This will grab current beam and its settings on the microscope to make a beam object. These settings will fully depend on the currently active beam as determined by xTUI. Tolerance values for voltage and current will be autopopulated as a ratio of current values predetermined in the constants.Constants() class.
  35    """
  36    selected_beam = active_imaging_device(microscope=microscope)
  37    beam = ut.beam_type(selected_beam, microscope)
  38
  39    voltage_kv = beam.high_voltage.value * Conversions.V_TO_KV
  40    voltage_tol_kv = voltage_kv * Constants.voltage_tol_ratio
  41
  42    current_na = beam.beam_current.value * Conversions.A_TO_NA
  43    current_tol_na = current_na * Constants.current_tol_ratio
  44
  45    hfw_mm = beam.horizontal_field_width.value * Conversions.M_TO_MM
  46
  47    working_dist_mm = beam.working_distance.value * Conversions.M_TO_MM
  48
  49    active_settings = tbt.BeamSettings(
  50        voltage_kv=voltage_kv,
  51        current_na=current_na,
  52        hfw_mm=hfw_mm,
  53        working_dist_mm=working_dist_mm,
  54        voltage_tol_kv=voltage_tol_kv,
  55        current_tol_na=current_tol_na,
  56    )
  57
  58    return type(selected_beam)(settings=active_settings)
  59
  60
  61def active_detector_settings(
  62    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
  63) -> tbt.Detector:
  64    """Detector factory
  65    This will grab current detector settings on the microscope to make a detector object. These settings will fully depend on the currently active detector as determined by xTUI.
  66    """
  67
  68    detector_type = microscope.detector.type.value
  69    detector_mode = microscope.detector.mode.value
  70    brightness = microscope.detector.brightness.value
  71    contrast = microscope.detector.contrast.value
  72    auto_cb_settings = tbt.ScanArea(
  73        left=None,
  74        top=None,
  75        width=None,
  76        height=None,
  77    )
  78    custom_settings = None
  79
  80    active_detector = tbt.Detector(
  81        type=detector_type,
  82        mode=detector_mode,
  83        brightness=brightness,
  84        contrast=contrast,
  85        auto_cb_settings=auto_cb_settings,
  86        custom_settings=custom_settings,
  87    )
  88
  89    return active_detector
  90
  91
  92def active_image_settings(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> tbt.ImageSettings:
  93    """"""
  94    beam = active_beam_with_settings(microscope=microscope)
  95    detector = active_detector_settings(microscope=microscope)
  96    scan = active_scan_settings(microscope=microscope)
  97    bit_depth = Constants.default_color_depth
  98
  99    active_image_settings = tbt.ImageSettings(
 100        microscope=microscope,
 101        beam=beam,
 102        detector=detector,
 103        scan=scan,
 104        bit_depth=bit_depth,
 105    )
 106
 107    return active_image_settings
 108
 109
 110def active_imaging_device(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> tbt.Beam:
 111    """Determines active imaging device and returns correct internal beam type object with null beam settings"""
 112    curr_device = tbt.Device(microscope.imaging.get_active_device())
 113    if curr_device == tbt.Device.ELECTRON_BEAM:
 114        selected_beam = beam_object_type(type=tbt.BeamType.ELECTRON)(
 115            settings=tbt.BeamSettings()
 116        )
 117    elif curr_device == tbt.Device.ION_BEAM:
 118        selected_beam = beam_object_type(type=tbt.BeamType.ION)(
 119            settings=tbt.BeamSettings()
 120        )
 121    else:
 122        raise ValueError(
 123            f"Currently selected device {curr_device}, make sure a quadrant in xTUI with either an Electron beam or Ion beam active is selected."
 124        )
 125    return selected_beam
 126
 127
 128def active_scan_settings(
 129    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
 130) -> tbt.Scan:
 131    """Scan factory
 132    This will grab current scan settings on the microscope to make a scan object. These settings will fully depend on the currently active scan settings as determined by xTUI.
 133    """
 134    selected_beam = active_imaging_device(microscope=microscope)
 135    beam = ut.beam_type(selected_beam, microscope)
 136
 137    rotation_deg = beam.scanning.rotation.value * Conversions.RAD_TO_DEG
 138    dwell_time_us = beam.scanning.dwell_time.value * Conversions.S_TO_US
 139    current_res = beam.scanning.resolution.value
 140    res = string_to_res(current_res)
 141    resolution = tbt.PresetResolution(res)
 142
 143    active_scan = tbt.Scan(
 144        rotation_deg=rotation_deg,
 145        dwell_time_us=dwell_time_us,
 146        resolution=resolution,
 147        # mode=mode,
 148    )
 149
 150    return active_scan
 151
 152
 153def active_stage_position_settings(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> tbt.StagePositionUser:
 154    """Returns current stage position in raw coordinate system and user units [mm, deg]"""
 155    stage.coordinate_system(microscope=microscope, mode=tbt.StageCoordinateSystem.RAW)
 156    # encoder positions (pos) are in meters and radians
 157    direct_encoder_pos = microscope.specimen.stage.current_position
 158    x_m, y_m, z_m = direct_encoder_pos.x, direct_encoder_pos.y, direct_encoder_pos.z
 159    r_rad, t_rad = direct_encoder_pos.r, direct_encoder_pos.t
 160    coord_system_str = direct_encoder_pos.coordinate_system
 161
 162    encoder_pos = tbt.StagePositionEncoder(
 163        x=x_m, y=y_m, z=z_m, r=r_rad, t=t_rad, coordinate_system=coord_system_str
 164    )
 165    user_pos = stage.encoder_to_user_position(encoder_pos)
 166
 167    # ensure r-axis is kept in axis limit
 168    if not ut.in_interval(
 169        val=user_pos.r_deg,
 170        limit=Constants.rotation_axis_limit_deg,
 171        type=tbt.IntervalType.RIGHT_OPEN,
 172    ):
 173        # used as right-open internal: 180.0 is not valid and should be converted to -180.0
 174        while user_pos.r_deg >= Constants.rotation_axis_limit_deg.max:
 175            new_r_deg = user_pos.r_deg - 360.0
 176        while user_pos.r_deg < Constants.rotation_axis_limit_deg.min:
 177            new_r_deg = user_pos.r_deg + 360.0
 178        user_pos = tbt.StagePositionUser(
 179            x_mm=user_pos.x_mm,
 180            y_mm=user_pos.y_mm,
 181            z_mm=user_pos.z_mm,
 182            r_deg=new_r_deg,
 183            t_deg=user_pos.t_deg,
 184        )
 185
 186    return user_pos
 187
 188
 189def active_laser_state() -> tbt.LaserState:
 190    """returns dictionary object for all properties that can be quickly read from the laser (not exhaustive)
 191    Power can be read but has its own method and is more involved.
 192    Flipper configuration can only be set, not read"""
 193    vals = tfs_laser.Laser_ReadValues()
 194    vals["objective_position_mm"] = tfs_laser.LIP_GetZPosition()
 195    vals["beam_shift_um_x"] = tfs_laser.BeamShift_Get_X()
 196    vals["beam_shift_um_y"] = tfs_laser.BeamShift_Get_Y()
 197    vals["shutter_state"] = tfs_laser.Shutter_GetState()
 198    vals["pattern"] = tfs_laser.Patterning_ReadValues()
 199    vals["expected_pattern_duration_s"] = tfs_laser.Patterning_GetExpectedDuration()
 200
 201    pattern_db = vals["pattern"]
 202    pattern_type = pattern_db["patternType"].lower()
 203    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(pattern_type, tbt.LaserPatternType):
 204        raise KeyError(
 205            f"Unsupported LaserPatternType of {pattern_type}, supported types include: {[i.value for i in tbt.LaserPatternType]}"
 206        )
 207    pattern_type = tbt.LaserPatternType(pattern_type)
 208    mode = tbt.LaserPatternMode(pattern_db["patterningMode"].lower())
 209    if mode == tbt.LaserPatternMode.COARSE:
 210        pixel_dwell_ms = pattern_db["dwellTime"]
 211        pulses_per_pixel = None
 212    elif mode == tbt.LaserPatternMode.FINE:
 213        pixel_dwell_ms = None
 214        pulses_per_pixel = pattern_db["pulsesPerPixel"]
 215    rotation_deg = pattern_db["patternRotation_deg"]
 216
 217    if pattern_type == tbt.LaserPatternType.BOX:
 218        geometry = tbt.LaserBoxPattern(
 219            passes=pattern_db["passes"],
 220            size_x_um=pattern_db["xSize_um"],
 221            size_y_um=pattern_db["ySize_um"],
 222            pitch_x_um=pattern_db["xPitch_um"],
 223            pitch_y_um=pattern_db["yPitch_um"],
 224            scan_type=tbt.LaserScanType(pattern_db["scanningMode"].lower()),
 225            coordinate_ref=tbt.CoordinateReference(
 226                pattern_db["coordReference"].lower()
 227            ),
 228        )
 229    if pattern_type == tbt.LaserPatternType.LINE:
 230        geometry = tbt.LaserLinePattern(
 231            passes=pattern_db["passes"],
 232            size_um=pattern_db["xSize_um"],
 233            pitch_um=pattern_db["xPitch_um"],
 234            scan_type=tbt.LaserScanType(pattern_db["scanningMode"].lower()),
 235        )
 236
 237    pattern = tbt.LaserPattern(
 238        mode=mode,
 239        rotation_deg=rotation_deg,
 240        geometry=geometry,
 241        pulses_per_pixel=pulses_per_pixel,
 242        pixel_dwell_ms=pixel_dwell_ms,
 243    )
 244
 245    state = tbt.LaserState(
 246        wavelength_nm=vals["wavelength_nm"],
 247        frequency_khz=vals["frequency_kHz"],
 248        pulse_divider=vals["pulse_divider"],
 249        pulse_energy_uj=vals["pulse_energy_uJ"],
 250        objective_position_mm=vals["objective_position_mm"],
 251        beam_shift_um=tbt.Point(x=vals["beam_shift_um_x"], y=vals["beam_shift_um_y"]),
 252        pattern=pattern,
 253        expected_pattern_duration_s=vals["expected_pattern_duration_s"],
 254    )
 255
 256    return state
 257
 258
 259def active_laser_settings(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> tbt.LaserSettings:
 260    """Laser Settings factory. Some values cannot be read by Laser Control, only set. For example, Polarization will default to "Vertical" as this value cannot be read"""
 261    state = active_laser_state()
 262
 263    settings = tbt.LaserSettings(
 264        microscope=microscope,
 265        pulse=tbt.LaserPulse(
 266            wavelength_nm=state.wavelength_nm,
 267            divider=state.pulse_divider,
 268            energy_uj=state.pulse_energy_uj,
 269            polarization=tbt.LaserPolarization.VERTICAL,  # TODO, can't read this, can only set it
 270        ),
 271        objective_position_mm=state.objective_position_mm,
 272        beam_shift_um=state.beam_shift_um,
 273        pattern=state.pattern,
 274    )
 275
 276    return settings
 277
 278
 279def available_detector_types(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> List[str]:
 280    """Returns available detector types on the current microscope"""
 281    detectors = microscope.detector.type.available_values
 282    # available = [tbt.DetectorType(i) for i in detectors]
 283    return detectors
 284
 285
 286def available_detector_modes(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> List[str]:
 287    """Returns available detector modes on the current microscope"""
 288    modes = microscope.detector.mode.available_values
 289    # available = [tbt.DetectorType(i) for i in modes]
 290    return modes
 291
 292
 293def beam_object_type(type: tbt.BeamType) -> tbt.Beam:
 294    if type.value == "electron":
 295        return tbt.ElectronBeam
 296    if type.value == "ion":
 297        return tbt.IonBeam
 298    raise NotImplementedError(f"Unsupported beam type {type.value}")
 299
 300
 301def stage_limits(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> tbt.StageLimits:
 302    """stage limits from current microscope connection"""
 303    stage.coordinate_system(microscope=microscope)
 304    # x position
 305    min_x_mm = (
 306        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.X).min
 307        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
 308    )
 309    max_x_mm = (
 310        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.X).max
 311        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
 312    )
 313    # y position
 314    min_y_mm = (
 315        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.Y).min
 316        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
 317    )
 318    max_y_mm = (
 319        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.Y).max
 320        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
 321    )
 322    # z position
 323    min_z_mm = (
 324        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.Z).min
 325        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
 326    )
 327    max_z_mm = (
 328        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.Z).max
 329        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
 330    )
 331    # r position
 332    min_r_deg = Constants.rotation_axis_limit_deg.min
 333    max_r_deg = Constants.rotation_axis_limit_deg.max
 334    # t position
 335    min_t_deg = (
 336        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.T).min
 337        * Conversions.RAD_TO_DEG
 338    )
 339    max_t_deg = (
 340        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.T).max
 341        * Conversions.RAD_TO_DEG
 342    )
 343
 344    return tbt.StageLimits(
 345        x_mm=tbt.Limit(min=min_x_mm, max=max_x_mm),
 346        y_mm=tbt.Limit(min=min_y_mm, max=max_y_mm),
 347        z_mm=tbt.Limit(min=min_z_mm, max=max_z_mm),
 348        r_deg=tbt.Limit(min=min_r_deg, max=max_r_deg),
 349        t_deg=tbt.Limit(min=min_t_deg, max=max_t_deg),
 350    )
 351
 352
 353def beam_limits(
 354    selected_beam: property,
 355    beam_type: tbt.BeamType,
 356) -> tbt.BeamLimits:
 357    # voltage range
 358    min_kv = selected_beam.high_voltage.limits.min * Conversions.V_TO_KV
 359    max_kv = selected_beam.high_voltage.limits.max * Conversions.V_TO_KV
 360
 361    # current range
 362    if beam_type == tbt.BeamType.ELECTRON:
 363        min_na = selected_beam.beam_current.limits.min * Conversions.A_TO_NA
 364        max_na = selected_beam.beam_current.limits.max * Conversions.A_TO_NA
 365    if beam_type == tbt.BeamType.ION:
 366        available_currents = selected_beam.beam_current.available_values
 367        min_na = min(available_currents) * Conversions.A_TO_NA
 368        max_na = max(available_currents) * Conversions.A_TO_NA
 369
 370    # hfw range
 371    min_hfw_mm = selected_beam.horizontal_field_width.limits.min * Conversions.M_TO_MM
 372    max_hfw_mm = selected_beam.horizontal_field_width.limits.max * Conversions.M_TO_MM
 373
 374    # working_dist range
 375    min_wd_mm = selected_beam.working_distance.limits.min * Conversions.M_TO_MM
 376    max_wd_mm = selected_beam.working_distance.limits.max * Conversions.M_TO_MM
 377
 378    return tbt.BeamLimits(
 379        voltage_kv=tbt.Limit(min=min_kv, max=max_kv),
 380        current_na=tbt.Limit(min=min_na, max=max_na),
 381        hfw_mm=tbt.Limit(min=min_hfw_mm, max=max_hfw_mm),
 382        working_distance_mm=tbt.Limit(min=min_wd_mm, max=max_wd_mm),
 383    )
 384
 385
 386def general(
 387    general_db: dict,
 388    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
 389) -> tbt.GeneralSettings:
 390    """Converts general setting dictionary to built-in type.
 391    Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested.
 392
 393    Args:
 394        general_db: general settings dictioanry from .yml
 395        yml_format: format specified by version of the .yml file
 396
 397    Returns:
 398        general settings
 399    """
 400
 401    if not yml_format in tbt.YMLFormatVersion:
 402        raise NotImplementedError(
 403            """Due to the complexity and number of variables, 
 404        image objects should only be constructed using a yml file."""
 405        )
 406    if not isinstance(yml_format, tbt.YMLFormatVersion):
 407        raise NotImplementedError(f"Unsupported yml format of {yml_format}.")
 408
 409    validate_general_settings(
 410        settings=general_db,
 411        yml_format=yml_format,
 412    )
 413
 414    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
 415        # slice thickness
 416        slice_thickness_um = general_db["slice_thickness_um"]
 417        # max slice number
 418        max_slice_number = general_db["max_slice_num"]
 419        # pre tilt
 420        pre_tilt_deg = general_db["pre_tilt_deg"]
 421        # sectioning axis
 422        sectioning_axis = tbt.SectioningAxis(general_db["sectioning_axis"])
 423        # stage tolerance
 424        stage_tolerance = tbt.StageTolerance(
 425            translational_um=general_db["stage_translational_tol_um"],
 426            angular_deg=general_db["stage_angular_tol_deg"],
 427        )
 428        # connection
 429        connection = tbt.MicroscopeConnection(
 430            general_db["connection_host"], general_db["connection_port"]
 431        )
 432        # EBSD OEM
 433        ebsd_oem = tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(general_db["EBSD_OEM"])
 434        # EDS OEM
 435        eds_oem = tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(general_db["EDS_OEM"])
 436        # exp dir
 437        exp_dir = general_db["exp_dir"]
 438        # h5 log name
 439        h5_log_name = general_db["h5_log_name"]
 440        # remove log file extension if the user provided it
 441        log_extension = Constants.logfile_extension
 442        if h5_log_name.endswith(log_extension):
 443            h5_log_name = h5_log_name[: -len(log_extension)]
 444        # step count
 445        step_count = general_db["step_count"]
 446
 447    general_settings = tbt.GeneralSettings(
 448        slice_thickness_um=slice_thickness_um,
 449        max_slice_number=max_slice_number,
 450        pre_tilt_deg=pre_tilt_deg,
 451        sectioning_axis=sectioning_axis,
 452        stage_tolerance=stage_tolerance,
 453        connection=connection,
 454        EBSD_OEM=ebsd_oem,
 455        EDS_OEM=eds_oem,
 456        exp_dir=Path(exp_dir),
 457        h5_log_name=h5_log_name,
 458        step_count=step_count,
 459    )
 460
 461    return general_settings
 462
 463
 464def laser_box_pattern(settings: dict) -> tbt.LaserBoxPattern:
 465    # if settings is None or ut.none_value_dictionary(dictionary=settings):
 466    #     return tbt.LaserBoxPattern()
 467    return tbt.LaserBoxPattern(
 468        passes=settings["passes"],
 469        size_x_um=settings["size_x_um"],
 470        size_y_um=settings["size_y_um"],
 471        pitch_x_um=settings["pitch_x_um"],
 472        pitch_y_um=settings["pitch_y_um"],
 473        scan_type=tbt.LaserScanType(settings["scan_type"]),
 474        coordinate_ref=tbt.CoordinateReference(settings["coordinate_ref"]),
 475    )
 476
 477
 478def laser_line_pattern(settings: dict) -> tbt.LaserBoxPattern:
 479    # if settings is None or ut.none_value_dictionary(dictionary=settings):
 480    #     return tbt.LaserLinePattern()
 481    return tbt.LaserLinePattern(
 482        passes=settings["passes"],
 483        size_um=settings["size_um"],
 484        pitch_um=settings["pitch_um"],
 485        scan_type=tbt.LaserScanType(settings["scan_type"]),
 486    )
 487
 488
 489def laser(
 490    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
 491    step_settings: dict,
 492    step_name: str,
 493    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
 494) -> tbt.LaserSettings:
 495    """Coverts laser step from .yml to microscope settings to perform laser milling. Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested"""
 496    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
 497        # pulse settings
 498        pulse_set_db = step_settings.get("pulse")
 499        if pulse_set_db is None:
 500            raise KeyError(
 501                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'pulse' settings found in 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
 502            )
 503        # laser optics settings
 504        optics_set_db = {
 505            "objective_position_mm": step_settings.get("objective_position_mm"),
 506            "beam_shift_um_x": step_settings.get("beam_shift").get("x_um"),
 507            "beam_shift_um_y": step_settings.get("beam_shift").get("y_um"),
 508        }
 509        # pattern settings
 510        pattern_set_db = step_settings.get("pattern")
 511        if pattern_set_db is None:
 512            raise KeyError(
 513                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'pattern' settings found in 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
 514            )
 515        line_pattern_db = pattern_set_db.get("type").get("line")
 516        box_pattern_db = pattern_set_db.get("type").get("box")
 517
 518    validate_pulse_settings(
 519        settings=pulse_set_db,
 520        yml_format=yml_format,
 521        step_name=step_name,
 522    )
 523    pulse = tbt.LaserPulse(
 524        wavelength_nm=tbt.LaserWavelength(pulse_set_db["wavelength_nm"]),
 525        divider=pulse_set_db["divider"],
 526        energy_uj=pulse_set_db["energy_uj"],
 527        polarization=tbt.LaserPolarization(pulse_set_db["polarization"]),
 528    )
 529
 530    validate_laser_optics_settings(
 531        settings=optics_set_db,
 532        yml_format=yml_format,
 533        step_name=step_name,
 534    )
 535
 536    pattern_type = validate_laser_pattern_settings(
 537        settings=pattern_set_db,
 538        yml_format=yml_format,
 539        step_name=step_name,
 540    )
 541    if pattern_type == tbt.LaserPatternType.BOX:
 542        geometry = laser_box_pattern(box_pattern_db)
 543    if pattern_type == tbt.LaserPatternType.LINE:
 544        geometry = laser_line_pattern(line_pattern_db)
 545    pattern = tbt.LaserPattern(
 546        mode=tbt.LaserPatternMode(pattern_set_db["mode"]),
 547        rotation_deg=pattern_set_db["rotation_deg"],
 548        pulses_per_pixel=pattern_set_db["pulses_per_pixel"],
 549        pixel_dwell_ms=pattern_set_db["pixel_dwell_ms"],
 550        geometry=geometry,
 551    )
 552
 553    laser_settings = tbt.LaserSettings(
 554        microscope=microscope,
 555        pulse=pulse,
 556        objective_position_mm=optics_set_db["objective_position_mm"],
 557        beam_shift_um=tbt.Point(
 558            x=optics_set_db["beam_shift_um_x"],
 559            y=optics_set_db["beam_shift_um_y"],
 560        ),
 561        pattern=pattern,
 562    )
 563
 564    return laser_settings
 565
 566
 567def image(
 568    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
 569    step_settings: dict,
 570    step_name: str,
 571    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
 572) -> tbt.ImageSettings:
 573    """Converts image step from .yml file to microscope settings
 574    to capture an image. Performs schema checking to ensure valid
 575    inputs are requested.
 576
 577    Args:
 578        microscope: the connection to the microscope
 579        step_settings: image step dictioanry from a .yml file
 580        yml_format: format specified by version of the .yml file
 581
 582    Returns:
 583        image settings
 584    """
 585    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
 586        step_general = step_settings.get(yml_format.step_general_key)
 587        if step_general is None:
 588            raise KeyError(
 589                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'step_general' settings found in step '{step_name}'."
 590            )
 591        step_type = step_general.get(yml_format.step_type_key)
 592        if step_type is None:
 593            raise KeyError(
 594                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'step_type' settings found in step '{step_name}'."
 595            )
 596        # beam settings
 597        beam_set_db = step_settings.get("beam")
 598        if beam_set_db is None:
 599            raise KeyError(
 600                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'beam' settings found in '{step_type}' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
 601            )
 602        beam_type_value = beam_set_db.get("type")
 603        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(beam_type_value, tbt.BeamType):
 604            raise NotImplementedError(
 605                f"Unsupported beam type of '{beam_type_value}', supported beam types are: {[i.value for i in tbt.BeamType]}."
 606            )
 607        beam_type = tbt.BeamType(beam_set_db.get("type"))
 608
 609        # detector settings
 610        detector_set_db = step_settings.get("detector")
 611        if detector_set_db is None:
 612            raise KeyError(
 613                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'detector' settings found in '{step_type}' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
 614            )
 615        auto_cb_set_db = detector_set_db.get("auto_cb")
 616
 617        # scan settings
 618        scan_set_db = step_settings.get("scan")
 619        if scan_set_db is None:
 620            raise KeyError(
 621                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'scan' settings found in '{step_type}' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
 622            )
 623        scan_res = string_to_res(scan_set_db.get("resolution"))
 624
 625        # misc settings
 626        bit_depth = step_settings.get("bit_depth")
 627
 628    # TODO incorporate tile settings
 629    if yml_format.version >= 1.1:
 630        # tile settings
 631        tile_set_db = step_settings.get("tile_settings")
 632
 633    validate_beam_settings(
 634        microscope=microscope,
 635        beam_type=beam_type,
 636        settings=beam_set_db,
 637        yml_format=yml_format,
 638        step_name=step_name,
 639    )
 640    beam_settings = tbt.BeamSettings(
 641        voltage_kv=beam_set_db["voltage_kv"],
 642        voltage_tol_kv=beam_set_db["voltage_tol_kv"],
 643        current_na=beam_set_db["current_na"],
 644        current_tol_na=beam_set_db["current_tol_na"],
 645        hfw_mm=beam_set_db["hfw_mm"],
 646        working_dist_mm=beam_set_db["working_dist_mm"],
 647        dynamic_focus=beam_set_db["dynamic_focus"],
 648        tilt_correction=beam_set_db["tilt_correction"],
 649    )
 650
 651    validate_auto_cb_settings(
 652        settings=auto_cb_set_db,
 653        yml_format=yml_format,
 654        step_name=step_name,
 655    )
 656    auto_cb_settings = tbt.ScanArea(
 657        left=auto_cb_set_db["left"],
 658        top=auto_cb_set_db["top"],
 659        width=auto_cb_set_db["width"],
 660        height=auto_cb_set_db["height"],
 661    )
 662
 663    validate_detector_settings(
 664        microscope=microscope,
 665        beam_type=beam_type,
 666        settings=detector_set_db,
 667        yml_format=yml_format,
 668        step_name=step_name,
 669    )
 670    detector_settings = tbt.Detector(
 671        type=tbt.DetectorType(detector_set_db["type"]),
 672        mode=tbt.DetectorMode(detector_set_db["mode"]),
 673        brightness=detector_set_db["brightness"],
 674        contrast=detector_set_db["contrast"],
 675        auto_cb_settings=auto_cb_settings,
 676        # custom_settings=None,
 677    )
 678
 679    validate_scan_settings(
 680        microscope=microscope,
 681        beam_type=beam_type,
 682        settings=scan_set_db,
 683        yml_format=yml_format,
 684        step_name=step_name,
 685    )
 686
 687    # cast resolution to preset if applicable
 688    if ut.valid_enum_entry(obj=scan_res, check_type=tbt.PresetResolution):
 689        scan_res = tbt.PresetResolution(scan_res)
 690
 691    scan_settings = tbt.Scan(
 692        rotation_deg=scan_set_db["rotation_deg"],
 693        dwell_time_us=scan_set_db["dwell_time_us"],
 694        resolution=scan_res,
 695        # mode=tbt.ScanMode(scan_set_db["mode"]),
 696    )
 697
 698    # make sure Scan rotation is 0 if dynamic focus or tilt correction is on (using auto mode only for angular correction)
 699    if beam_settings.dynamic_focus or beam_settings.tilt_correction:
 700        if not math.isclose(a=scan_settings.rotation_deg, b=0.0):
 701            raise ValueError(
 702                f"Invalid .yml for step '{step_name}'. Scan rotation of '{scan_settings.rotation_deg}' degrees requested with tilt_correction and/or dynamic focus set to 'True'. Cannot use dynamic focus or tilt correction for non-zero scan rotation."
 703            )
 704
 705    # validate bit_depth
 706    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(bit_depth, tbt.ColorDepth):
 707        valid_bit_depths = [i.value for i in tbt.ColorDepth]
 708        raise ValueError(
 709            f"Unsupported bit depth of {bit_depth}, available depths are {valid_bit_depths}"
 710        )
 711
 712    image_settings = tbt.ImageSettings(
 713        microscope=microscope,
 714        beam=beam_object_type(beam_type)(settings=beam_settings),
 715        detector=detector_settings,
 716        scan=scan_settings,
 717        bit_depth=bit_depth,
 718    )
 719
 720    return image_settings
 721
 722
 723# TODO
 724def fib(
 725    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
 726    step_settings: dict,
 727    step_name: str,
 728    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
 729) -> tbt.EDSSettings:
 730    """Converts image step from .yml file to microscope settings
 731    to capture an ebsd image. Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested.
 732    """
 733    ## create image_step_settings from this
 734    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
 735        image_step_settings = step_settings.get("image")
 736        image_step_settings["step_general"] = step_settings.get("step_general")
 737
 738        mill_step_settings = step_settings.get("mill")
 739        mill_beam_db = mill_step_settings.get("beam")
 740        mill_pattern_db = mill_step_settings.get("pattern")
 741
 742    # ensure image is with an ion beam
 743    enforce_beam_type(
 744        tbt.IonBeam(settings=None),
 745        step_settings=image_step_settings,
 746        step_name=step_name,
 747        yml_format=yml_format,
 748    )
 749    image_settings = image(
 750        microscope=microscope,
 751        step_settings=image_step_settings,
 752        step_name=step_name,
 753        yml_format=yml_format,
 754    )
 755
 756    ## fib mill settings
 757    # ensure milling is with an ion beam
 758    enforce_beam_type(
 759        tbt.IonBeam(settings=None),
 760        step_settings=mill_step_settings,
 761        step_name=step_name,
 762        yml_format=yml_format,
 763    )
 764    beam_type = tbt.BeamType(mill_beam_db.get("type"))
 765    # mill beam
 766    validate_beam_settings(
 767        microscope=microscope,
 768        beam_type=beam_type,
 769        settings=mill_beam_db,
 770        yml_format=yml_format,
 771        step_name=step_name,
 772    )
 773    mill_beam = tbt.IonBeam(
 774        settings=tbt.BeamSettings(
 775            voltage_kv=mill_beam_db["voltage_kv"],
 776            voltage_tol_kv=mill_beam_db["voltage_tol_kv"],
 777            current_na=mill_beam_db["current_na"],
 778            current_tol_na=mill_beam_db["current_tol_na"],
 779            hfw_mm=mill_beam_db["hfw_mm"],
 780            working_dist_mm=mill_beam_db["working_dist_mm"],
 781            dynamic_focus=mill_beam_db["dynamic_focus"],
 782            tilt_correction=mill_beam_db["tilt_correction"],
 783        )
 784    )
 785
 786    # fib pattern settings
 787    pattern = validate_fib_pattern_settings(
 788        settings=mill_pattern_db,
 789        yml_format=yml_format,
 790        step_name=step_name,
 791    )
 792
 793    fib_settings = tbt.FIBSettings(
 794        microscope=microscope,
 795        image=image_settings,
 796        mill_beam=mill_beam,
 797        pattern=pattern,
 798    )
 799    return fib_settings
 800
 801
 802@singledispatch
 803def enforce_beam_type(
 804    beam_type,
 805    step_settings: dict,
 806    step_name: str,
 807    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
 808) -> bool:
 809    """Enforce a specific beam type is used for an operation based on a dictionary. Dictionary must contain sub-dictionary with key 'beam'"""
 810    _ = beam_type
 811    __ = step_settings
 812    ___ = step_name
 813    ____ = yml_format
 814    raise NotImplementedError(f"No handler for type {type(step_settings)}")
 815
 816
 817@enforce_beam_type.register
 818def _(
 819    beam_type: tbt.ElectronBeam,
 820    step_settings: dict,
 821    step_name: str,
 822    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
 823) -> bool:
 824    # beam must be electron
 825    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
 826        beam_set_db = step_settings.get("beam")
 827        if beam_set_db is None:
 828            raise KeyError(
 829                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'beam' settings found in step '{step_name}'."
 830            )
 831        beam_type_value = beam_set_db.get("type")
 832
 833        electron_beam_error_message = f"Unsupported beam type of '{beam_type_value}' in step '{step_name}'. '{tbt.BeamType.ELECTRON.value}' beam type must be used."
 834        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(beam_type_value, tbt.BeamType):
 835            raise NotImplementedError(electron_beam_error_message)
 836        if not tbt.BeamType(beam_type_value) == tbt.BeamType.ELECTRON:
 837            raise NotImplementedError(electron_beam_error_message)
 838
 839
 840@enforce_beam_type.register
 841def _(
 842    beam_type: tbt.IonBeam,
 843    step_settings: dict,
 844    step_name: str,
 845    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
 846) -> bool:
 847    # beam must be ion
 848    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
 849        beam_set_db = step_settings.get("beam")
 850        if beam_set_db is None:
 851            raise KeyError(
 852                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'beam' settings found in step '{step_name}'."
 853            )
 854        beam_type_value = beam_set_db.get("type")
 855
 856        ion_beam_error_message = f"Unsupported beam type of '{beam_type_value}' for step '{step_name}'. '{tbt.BeamType.ION.value}' beam type must be used."
 857        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(beam_type_value, tbt.BeamType):
 858            raise NotImplementedError(ion_beam_error_message)
 859        if not tbt.BeamType(beam_type_value) == tbt.BeamType.ION:
 860            raise NotImplementedError(ion_beam_error_message)
 861
 862
 863def ebsd(
 864    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
 865    step_settings: dict,
 866    step_name: str,
 867    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
 868) -> tbt.EBSDSettings:
 869    """Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested."""
 870    enforce_beam_type(
 871        tbt.ElectronBeam(settings=None),
 872        step_settings=step_settings,
 873        step_name=step_name,
 874        yml_format=yml_format,
 875    )
 876    image_settings = image(
 877        microscope=microscope,
 878        step_settings=step_settings,
 879        step_name=step_name,
 880        yml_format=yml_format,
 881    )
 882    concurrent_EDS = step_settings.get("concurrent_EDS")
 883    if (concurrent_EDS is None) or (not concurrent_EDS):
 884        enable_eds = False
 885    elif concurrent_EDS == True:
 886        enable_eds = True
 887    else:
 888        raise KeyError(
 889            f"Invalid .yml file, for step '{step_name}', an EBSD type step. 'concurrent_EDS' key is '{concurrent_EDS}' of type {type(concurrent_EDS)} but must be boolean (True/False) or of NoneType (null in .yml)."
 890        )
 891    ebsd_settings = tbt.EBSDSettings(
 892        image=image_settings,
 893        enable_eds=enable_eds,
 894        enable_ebsd=True,
 895    )
 896    return ebsd_settings
 897
 898
 899def eds(
 900    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
 901    step_settings: dict,
 902    step_name: str,
 903    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
 904) -> tbt.EDSSettings:
 905    """Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested."""
 906    enforce_beam_type(
 907        tbt.ElectronBeam(settings=None),
 908        step_settings=step_settings,
 909        step_name=step_name,
 910        yml_format=yml_format,
 911    )
 912    image_settings = image(
 913        microscope=microscope,
 914        step_settings=step_settings,
 915        step_name=step_name,
 916        yml_format=yml_format,
 917    )
 918    eds_settings = tbt.EDSSettings(
 919        image=image_settings,
 920        enable_eds=True,
 921    )
 922    return eds_settings
 923
 924
 925# def ebsd_eds(
 926#     microscope: tbt.Microscope,
 927#     step_settings: dict,
 928#     step_name: str,
 929#     yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
 930# ) -> tbt.EDSSettings:
 931#     """Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested."""
 932#     enforce_beam_type(
 933#         tbt.ElectronBeam(settings=None),
 934#         step_settings=step_settings,
 935#         step_name=step_name,
 936#         yml_format=yml_format,
 937#     )
 938#     image_settings = image(
 939#         microscope=microscope,
 940#         step_settings=step_settings,
 941#         step_name=step_name,
 942#         yml_format=yml_format,
 943#     )
 944#     ebsd_eds_settings = tbt.EBSD_EDSSettings(
 945#         image=image_settings,
 946#         enable_ebsd=True,
 947#         enable_eds=True,
 948#     )
 949#     return ebsd_eds_settings
 950
 951
 952def custom(
 953    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
 954    step_settings: dict,
 955    step_name: str,
 956    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
 957) -> tbt.CustomSettings:
 958    """Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested."""
 959    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
 960        script_path = step_settings.get("script_path")
 961        if script_path is None:
 962            raise KeyError(
 963                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'script_path' found in custom step_type for step '{step_name}'."
 964            )
 965        if not Path(script_path).is_file():
 966            raise ValueError(
 967                f"Invalid location for script at location {script_path}. File does not exist."
 968            )
 969
 970        executable_path = step_settings.get("executable_path")
 971        if executable_path is None:
 972            raise KeyError(
 973                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'executable_path' found in custom step_type for step '{step_name}'."
 974            )
 975        if not Path(executable_path).is_file():
 976            raise ValueError(
 977                f"Invalid location for executable at location {executable_path}. File does not exist."
 978            )
 979
 980    custom_settings = tbt.CustomSettings(
 981        script_path=Path(script_path),
 982        executable_path=Path(executable_path),
 983    )
 984    return custom_settings
 985
 986
 987def fib_pattern_type(
 988    settings: tbt.FIBSettings,
 989) -> Union[tbt.FIBBoxPattern, tbt.FIBStreamPattern]:
 990    """Returns specific pattern type settings for a properly formatted FIBSettings object"""
 991
 992
 993def scan_limits(
 994    selected_beam: property,
 995) -> tbt.ScanLimits:
 996    """Scan settings limits"""
 997    # rotation
 998    min_deg = selected_beam.scanning.rotation.limits.min * Conversions.RAD_TO_DEG
 999    max_deg = selected_beam.scanning.rotation.limits.max * Conversions.RAD_TO_DEG
1000    # dwell_time
1001    min_dwell_us = selected_beam.scanning.dwell_time.limits.min * Conversions.S_TO_US
1002    max_dwell_us = selected_beam.scanning.dwell_time.limits.max * Conversions.S_TO_US
1003
1004    return tbt.ScanLimits(
1005        rotation_deg=tbt.Limit(min=min_deg, max=max_deg),
1006        dwell_us=tbt.Limit(min=min_dwell_us, max=max_dwell_us),
1007    )
1008
1009
1010def string_to_res(input: str) -> tbt.Resolution:
1011    """Converts string in format of "{{width}}x{{height}}" to resolution object"""
1012    try:
1013        split_res = (input.lower()).split("x")
1014        width, height = int(split_res[0]), int(split_res[1])
1015    except:
1016        raise ValueError(
1017            f"""Invalid string format, 
1018                            expected string format of "WIDTHxHEIGHT", 
1019                            but received the following: "{input}"."""
1020        )
1021
1022    return tbt.Resolution(width=width, height=height)
1023
1024
1025def valid_string_resolution(string_resolution: str) -> bool:
1026    """validates string resolution"""
1027    res = string_to_res(string_resolution)
1028    width, height = res.width, res.height
1029    return (
1030        ut.in_interval(
1031            width,
1032            limit=Constants.scan_resolution_limit,
1033            type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1034        )
1035    ) and (
1036        ut.in_interval(
1037            height,
1038            limit=Constants.scan_resolution_limit,
1039            type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1040        )
1041    )
1042
1043
1044def validate_auto_cb_settings(
1045    settings: dict,
1046    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1047    step_name: str,
1048) -> bool:
1049    """Schema checking for auto contrast/brightness setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1050
1051    if ut.none_value_dictionary(settings):
1052        return True
1053
1054    if settings.get("left") is None or settings.get("top") is None:
1055        if settings.get("left") is None:
1056            missing_key = "left"
1057        else:
1058            missing_key = "top"
1059        raise KeyError(
1060            f"Missing or no value for '{missing_key}' key in 'auto_cb' sub-dictionary in step '{step_name}' All 'auto_cb' sub-dictionary values must be declared by the user to implement this capability."
1061        )
1062
1063    origin_limit = tbt.Limit(min=0.0, max=1.0)  # reduced area limit for scan window
1064    width_limit = tbt.Limit(min=0.0, max=1.0 - settings["left"])
1065    height_limit = tbt.Limit(min=0.0, max=1.0 - settings["top"])
1066
1067    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1068        schema = Schema(
1069            {
1070                "left": And(
1071                    float,
1072                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1073                        x,
1074                        limit=origin_limit,
1075                        type=tbt.IntervalType.RIGHT_OPEN,
1076                    ),
1077                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested auto contrast/brightness window setting 'left' of '{settings['left']}' must satisfy '0 <= left < {origin_limit.max}'. Origin is in top-left corner of the field of view.",
1078                ),
1079                "top": And(
1080                    float,
1081                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1082                        x,
1083                        limit=origin_limit,
1084                        type=tbt.IntervalType.RIGHT_OPEN,
1085                    ),
1086                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested auto contrast/brightness windows setting 'top' of '{settings['top']}' must satisfy '0.0 <= top < {origin_limit.max}'. Origin is in top-left corner of the field of view.",
1087                ),
1088                "width": And(
1089                    float,
1090                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1091                        x,
1092                        limit=width_limit,
1093                        type=tbt.IntervalType.LEFT_OPEN,
1094                    ),
1095                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested auto contrast/brightness windows setting 'width' of {settings['width']} must satisfy '0.0 < width <= {width_limit.max}' with 'left' setting of {settings['left']} as total width ('left' + 'width') cannot exceed 1.0",
1096                ),
1097                "height": And(
1098                    float,
1099                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1100                        x,
1101                        limit=height_limit,
1102                        type=tbt.IntervalType.LEFT_OPEN,
1103                    ),
1104                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested auto contrast/brightness windows setting 'height' of {settings['height']} must satisfy '0.0 < height <= {height_limit.max}' with 'top' setting of {settings['top']} as total height ('top' + 'height') cannot exceed 1.0",
1105                ),
1106            },
1107            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1108        )
1109
1110    try:
1111        schema.validate(settings)
1112    except UnboundLocalError:
1113        raise ValueError(
1114            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1115        )
1116    return True
1117
1118
1119def validate_stage_position(
1120    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
1121    step_name: str,
1122    settings: dict,
1123    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1124) -> bool:
1125    """Schema checking for stage position dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1126    limits = stage_limits(microscope=microscope)
1127
1128    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1129        schema = Schema(
1130            {
1131                "x_mm": And(
1132                    float,
1133                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1134                        x,
1135                        limit=limits.x_mm,
1136                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1137                    ),
1138                    error=f"Requested x-axis position of {settings['x_mm']} mm for step '{step_name}' must satisfy '{limits.x_mm.min} <= x_mm <= {limits.x_mm.max}'",
1139                ),
1140                "y_mm": And(
1141                    float,
1142                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1143                        x,
1144                        limit=limits.y_mm,
1145                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1146                    ),
1147                    error=f"Requested y-axis position of {settings['y_mm']} mm for step '{step_name}' must satisfy '{limits.y_mm.min} <= y_mm <= {limits.y_mm.max}'",
1148                ),
1149                "z_mm": And(
1150                    float,
1151                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1152                        x,
1153                        limit=limits.z_mm,
1154                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1155                    ),
1156                    error=f"Requested z-axis position of {settings['z_mm']} mm for step '{step_name}' must satisfy '{limits.z_mm.min} <= z_mm <= {limits.z_mm.max}'",
1157                ),
1158                "r_deg": And(
1159                    float,
1160                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1161                        x,
1162                        limit=limits.r_deg,
1163                        type=tbt.IntervalType.RIGHT_OPEN,
1164                    ),
1165                    error=f"Requested r-axis position of {settings['r_deg']} degree for step '{step_name}' must satisfy '{limits.r_deg.min} <= r_deg < {limits.r_deg.max}'",
1166                ),
1167                "t_deg": And(
1168                    float,
1169                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1170                        x,
1171                        limit=limits.t_deg,
1172                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1173                    ),
1174                    error=f"Requested r-axis position of {settings['t_deg']} degree for step '{step_name}' must satisfy '{limits.t_deg.min} <= t_deg <= {limits.t_deg.max}'",
1175                ),
1176            },
1177            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1178        )
1179
1180    try:
1181        schema.validate(settings)
1182    except UnboundLocalError:
1183        raise ValueError(
1184            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1185        )
1186
1187
1188def validate_beam_settings(
1189    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
1190    beam_type: tbt.BeamType,
1191    settings: dict,
1192    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1193    step_name: str,
1194) -> bool:
1195    """Schema checking for beam setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1196    specified_beam = beam_object_type(beam_type)(settings=tbt.BeamSettings())
1197    selected_beam = ut.beam_type(specified_beam, microscope)
1198
1199    limits = beam_limits(selected_beam, beam_type)
1200
1201    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1202        schema = Schema(
1203            {
1204                "voltage_kv": And(
1205                    float,
1206                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1207                        x,
1208                        limit=limits.voltage_kv,
1209                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1210                    ),
1211                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested voltage of '{settings['voltage_kv']}' kV not within limits of {limits.voltage_kv.min} kV and {limits.voltage_kv.max} kV.",
1212                ),
1213                "voltage_tol_kv": And(
1214                    float,
1215                    lambda x: x > 0,
1216                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested voltage tolerance of '{settings['voltage_tol_kv']}' kV must be a positive float (greater than 0).",
1217                ),
1218                "current_na": And(
1219                    float,
1220                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1221                        x,
1222                        limit=limits.current_na,
1223                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1224                    ),
1225                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested voltage of '{settings['current_na']}' nA not within limits of {limits.current_na.min} nA and {limits.current_na.max} nA",
1226                ),
1227                "current_tol_na": And(
1228                    float,
1229                    lambda x: x > 0,
1230                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', 'current_tol_na' must be a positive float (greater than 0)",
1231                ),
1232                "hfw_mm": And(
1233                    float,
1234                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1235                        x,
1236                        limits.hfw_mm,
1237                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1238                    ),
1239                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested horizontal field width of '{settings['hfw_mm']}' mm not within limits of {limits.hfw_mm.min} mm and {limits.hfw_mm.max} mm",
1240                ),
1241                "working_dist_mm": And(
1242                    float,
1243                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1244                        x,
1245                        limit=limits.working_distance_mm,
1246                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1247                    ),
1248                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested working distance of '{settings['working_dist_mm']}' mm not within limits of {limits.working_distance_mm.min} mm and {limits.working_distance_mm.max} mm",
1249                ),
1250            },
1251            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1252        )
1253
1254        e_beam_schema = Schema(
1255            {
1256                "dynamic_focus": Or(
1257                    None,
1258                    bool,
1259                    error=f"In step '{step_name}' with 'electron' beam imaging, 'dynamic_focus' must be a boolean value but '{settings['dynamic_focus']}' of type {type(settings['dynamic_focus'])} was requested.",
1260                ),
1261                "tilt_correction": Or(
1262                    None,
1263                    bool,
1264                    error=f"In step '{step_name}' with 'electron' beam imaging, 'tilt_correction' must be a boolean value but '{settings['tilt_correction']}' of type {type(settings['tilt_correction'])} was requested.",
1265                ),
1266            },
1267            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1268        )
1269        i_beam_schema = Schema(
1270            {
1271                "dynamic_focus": Or(
1272                    None,
1273                    False,
1274                    error=f"In step '{step_name}' with 'ion' beam imaging, 'dynamic_focus' must be 'False' or 'None' but '{settings['dynamic_focus']}' of type {type(settings['dynamic_focus'])} was requested.",
1275                ),
1276                "tilt_correction": Or(
1277                    None,
1278                    False,
1279                    error=f"In step '{step_name}' with 'ion' beam imaging, 'tilt_correction' must be 'False' or 'None' but '{settings['tilt_correction']}' of type {type(settings['tilt_correction'])} was requested.",
1280                ),
1281            },
1282            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1283        )
1284
1285    try:
1286        schema.validate(settings)
1287        if specified_beam.type == tbt.BeamType.ELECTRON:
1288            e_beam_schema.validate(settings)
1289        if specified_beam.type == tbt.BeamType.ION:
1290            i_beam_schema.validate(settings)
1291    except UnboundLocalError:
1292        raise ValueError(
1293            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1294        )
1295
1296
1297def validate_detector_settings(
1298    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
1299    beam_type: tbt.BeamType,
1300    settings: dict,
1301    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1302    step_name: str,
1303) -> bool:
1304    """Schema checking for detector setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1305
1306    # switch to top left quad, enable e-beam
1307    devices.device_access(microscope=microscope)
1308
1309    # set specified beam to active imaging device
1310    specified_beam = beam_object_type(beam_type)(settings=tbt.BeamSettings())
1311    img.set_beam_device(
1312        microscope=microscope,
1313        device=specified_beam.device,
1314    )
1315
1316    auto_cb_db = settings.get("auto_cb")
1317    use_auto_cb = not ut.none_value_dictionary(settings.get("auto_cb"))
1318    if use_auto_cb and (
1319        settings.get("brightness") is not None or settings.get("contrast") is not None
1320    ):
1321        raise KeyError(
1322            f"Auto contrast/brightness settings of {auto_cb_db} provided while settings of fixed brightness of '{settings.get('brightness')}' and fixed contrast of '{settings.get('contrast')}' were also provided. Users may use either fixed brightness/contrast values or auto contrast/brightness settings, but not both."
1323        )
1324
1325    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1326        detector = settings.get("type")
1327        mode = settings.get("mode")
1328        cb_limit = tbt.Limit(min=0.0, max=1.0)
1329        schema = Schema(
1330            {
1331                "brightness": Or(
1332                    None,
1333                    And(
1334                        float,
1335                        lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1336                            x,
1337                            limit=cb_limit,
1338                            type=tbt.IntervalType.LEFT_OPEN,
1339                        ),
1340                    ),
1341                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested fixed brightness of '{settings['brightness']}'. This is not within limits of '>{cb_limit.min}' and '<={cb_limit.max}'.",
1342                ),
1343                "contrast": Or(
1344                    None,
1345                    And(
1346                        float,
1347                        lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1348                            x,
1349                            limit=cb_limit,
1350                            type=tbt.IntervalType.LEFT_OPEN,
1351                        ),
1352                    ),
1353                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested fixed contrast of '{settings['contrast']}'. This is either not within limits of '>{cb_limit.min}' and '<={cb_limit.max}'.",
1354                ),
1355            },
1356            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1357        )
1358
1359    # check detector type
1360    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(detector, tbt.DetectorType):
1361        raise ValueError(
1362            f"Unsupported detector type of '{detector}' on step '{step_name}'."
1363        )
1364    detector_type = tbt.DetectorType(detector)
1365    microscope_detector_types = available_detector_types(microscope=microscope)
1366    if detector_type.value not in microscope_detector_types:
1367        raise ValueError(
1368            f"Requested detector of {detector_type.value} is unavailable on this tool. Available detectors are: {microscope_detector_types}"
1369        )
1370    # make sure to set this detector as the active one to access modes
1371    img.detector_type(
1372        microscope=microscope,
1373        detector=detector_type,
1374    )
1375
1376    # check detector mode
1377    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(mode, tbt.DetectorMode):
1378        raise ValueError(
1379            f'Unsupported detector mode of "{mode}" for "{detector}" detector'
1380        )
1381    detector_mode = tbt.DetectorMode(mode)
1382    microscope_detector_modes = available_detector_modes(microscope=microscope)
1383    if detector_mode.value not in microscope_detector_modes:
1384        raise ValueError(
1385            f"Requested mode of {detector_mode.value} for {detector_type.value} detector is invalid. Valid mode types are: {microscope_detector_modes}"
1386        )
1387
1388    # check detector settings
1389    try:
1390        schema.validate(settings)
1391    except UnboundLocalError:
1392        raise ValueError(
1393            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1394        )
1395
1396
1397def validate_EBSD_EDS_settings(
1398    connection_host: str,
1399    connection_port: str,
1400    ebsd_oem: str,
1401    eds_oem: str,
1402) -> bool:
1403    """Checks EBSD and EDS OEM and connection for supported OEMs"""
1404    # ensure same manufacturer for both EBSD and EDS
1405    if (ebsd_oem is not None) and (eds_oem is not None) and (ebsd_oem != eds_oem):
1406        raise NotImplementedError(
1407            f"Differing EBSD and EDS OEMs are not supported. Requested EBSD OEM of '{ebsd_oem}' and EDS OEM of '{eds_oem}'."
1408        )
1409
1410    # Check EBSD OEM
1411    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(ebsd_oem, tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM):
1412        raise ValueError(
1413            f"Unsupported EBSD OEM of '{ebsd_oem}'. Supported OEM types are: {[i.value for i in tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM]}"
1414        )
1415    ebsd_device = tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(ebsd_oem)
1416    # Check EDS OEM
1417    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(eds_oem, tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM):
1418        raise ValueError(
1419            f"Unsupported EDS OEM of '{eds_oem}'. Supported OEM types are: {[i.value for i in tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM]}"
1420        )
1421    eds_device = tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(eds_oem)
1422
1423    # exit if both devices are none, no need for laser control
1424    if ebsd_device == eds_device == tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM.NONE:
1425        return True
1426
1427    # check EBSD and EDS connection
1428    try:
1429        external
1430    except:
1431        raise SystemError(
1432            "EBSD and/or EDS control requested, but Laser API not accessible, so cannot use EBSD and EDS control. Please restart Laser API, or if not installed, change OEM to 'null', or leave blank in settings file."
1433        )
1434    microscope = tbt.Microscope()
1435    ut.connect_microscope(
1436        microscope=microscope,
1437        quiet_output=True,
1438        connection_host=connection_host,
1439        connection_port=connection_port,
1440    )
1441    if tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(eds_oem) != tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM.NONE:
1442        devices.retract_EDS(microscope=microscope)
1443    if tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(ebsd_oem) != tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM.NONE:
1444        devices.retract_EBSD(microscope=microscope)
1445    ut.disconnect_microscope(
1446        microscope=microscope,
1447        quiet_output=True,
1448    )
1449    return True
1450
1451
1452def validate_general_settings(
1453    settings: dict,
1454    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1455) -> bool:
1456    """Schema checking for general setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format.
1457    Checks microscope connection
1458    Checks EBSD/EDS connection if valid OEM specified
1459    """
1460
1461    if settings == {}:
1462        raise ValueError("General settings dictionary is empty.")
1463
1464    slice_thickness_limit_um = Constants.slice_thickness_limit_um
1465    pre_tilt_limit_deg = Constants.pre_tilt_limit_deg_generic
1466
1467    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1468        sectioning_axis = settings["sectioning_axis"]
1469        connection_host = settings["connection_host"]
1470        connection_port = settings["connection_port"]
1471        ebsd_oem = settings["EBSD_OEM"]
1472        eds_oem = settings["EDS_OEM"]
1473        exp_dir = settings["exp_dir"]
1474        h5_log_name = settings["h5_log_name"]
1475
1476    # Validate the non-numeric values
1477    # Check sectioning axis
1478    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(sectioning_axis, tbt.SectioningAxis):
1479        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported sectioning axis of {sectioning_axis}.")
1480    # TODO
1481    if tbt.SectioningAxis(sectioning_axis) != tbt.SectioningAxis.Z:
1482        raise NotImplementedError("Currently only Z-axis sectioning is supported.")
1483    if tbt.SectioningAxis(sectioning_axis) != tbt.SectioningAxis.Z:
1484        pre_tilt_limit_deg = Constants.pre_tilt_limit_deg_non_Z_sectioning  # overwrite
1485        warnings.warn(
1486            "Pre-tilt value must be zero (0.0) degrees when using a sectioning axis other than 'Z'"
1487        )
1488    # Check connection host and port
1489    if not ut.valid_microscope_connection(
1490        host=connection_host,
1491        port=connection_port,
1492    ):
1493        raise ValueError(
1494            f"Unsupported connection with host of {connection_host} and port of {connection_port}."
1495        )
1496
1497    # check EBSD and EDS
1498    validate_EBSD_EDS_settings(
1499        connection_host=connection_host,
1500        connection_port=connection_port,
1501        ebsd_oem=ebsd_oem,
1502        eds_oem=eds_oem,
1503    )
1504
1505    # Check exp dir
1506    try:
1507        Path(exp_dir).mkdir(
1508            parents=True,
1509            exist_ok=True,
1510        )
1511    except TypeError:
1512        raise ValueError(
1513            f'Requested experimental directory of "{exp_dir}", which is not a valid path.'
1514        )
1515    # Check h5 log name
1516    if not isinstance(h5_log_name, str):
1517        raise ValueError(f'Unsupported h5 log name of "{h5_log_name}"')
1518
1519    schema = Schema(
1520        {
1521            "slice_thickness_um": And(
1522                float,
1523                lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1524                    x,
1525                    limit=slice_thickness_limit_um,
1526                    type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1527                ),
1528                error=f"Requested slice thickness of {settings['slice_thickness_um']} um must satisfy '{slice_thickness_limit_um.min} <= slice_thickness_um <= {slice_thickness_limit_um.max}'",
1529            ),
1530            "max_slice_num": And(
1531                int,
1532                lambda x: x > 0,
1533                error=f"Requested max slice number of {settings['max_slice_num']} must satisfy '0 < max_slice_number'",
1534            ),
1535            "pre_tilt_deg": And(
1536                float,
1537                lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1538                    x,
1539                    limit=pre_tilt_limit_deg,
1540                    type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1541                ),
1542                error=f"Requested pre tilt of {settings['pre_tilt_deg']} degrees must satisfy '{pre_tilt_limit_deg.min} <= pre_tilt_deg <= {pre_tilt_limit_deg.max}'",
1543            ),
1544            "stage_translational_tol_um": And(
1545                float,
1546                lambda x: x > 0,
1547                error=f"Requested stage translational tolerance of {settings['stage_translational_tol_um']} um must be a positive float (greater than 0)",
1548            ),
1549            "stage_angular_tol_deg": And(
1550                float,
1551                lambda x: x > 0,
1552                error=f"Requested stage angular tolerance of {settings['stage_angular_tol_deg']} degrees must be a positive float (greater than 0)",
1553            ),
1554            "step_count": And(
1555                int,
1556                lambda x: x > 0,
1557                error=f"Requested step count of {settings['step_count']} must be a positive int (greater than 0)",
1558            ),
1559        },
1560        ignore_extra_keys=True,
1561    )
1562
1563    try:
1564        schema.validate(settings)
1565    except UnboundLocalError:
1566        raise ValueError(
1567            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1568        )
1569
1570
1571def validate_scan_settings(
1572    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
1573    beam_type: tbt.BeamType,
1574    settings: dict,
1575    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1576    step_name: str,
1577) -> bool:
1578    """Schema checking for beam setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1579    specified_beam = beam_object_type(beam_type)(settings=tbt.BeamSettings())
1580    selected_beam = ut.beam_type(specified_beam, microscope)
1581
1582    """Schema checking for scan setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1583    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1584        limits = scan_limits(selected_beam)
1585        resolution = settings["resolution"]
1586        rotation_limit = limits.rotation_deg
1587        dwell_limit = limits.dwell_us
1588
1589    # check resolution
1590    res = string_to_res(resolution)
1591
1592    schema = Schema(
1593        {
1594            "resolution": And(
1595                str,
1596                lambda x: valid_string_resolution(x),
1597                error=f"In '{step_name}', resolution provided was {settings['resolution']}, but must be an integer width and height in format '[width]x[height]'  with each dimension satisfying '{Constants.scan_resolution_limit.min} <= [value] <=  {Constants.scan_resolution_limit.max}",
1598            ),
1599            "rotation_deg": And(
1600                float,
1601                lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1602                    x,
1603                    limit=rotation_limit,
1604                    type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1605                ),
1606                error=f"In '{step_name}', requested fixed rotation of '{settings['rotation_deg']}' degrees. This is not a float or not within limits of '>={rotation_limit.min}' and '<={rotation_limit.max}' degrees. Setting is of type {type(settings['rotation_deg'])}.",
1607            ),
1608            "dwell_time_us": And(
1609                float,
1610                lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1611                    x,
1612                    limit=dwell_limit,
1613                    type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1614                ),
1615                error=f"In '{step_name}', requested fixed dwell_time of '{settings['dwell_time_us']}' microseconds. This is a float or not within limits of '>={dwell_limit.min}' and '<={dwell_limit.max}' microseconds. Settting is of type {type(settings['dwell_time_us'])}.",
1616            ),
1617        },
1618        ignore_extra_keys=True,
1619    )
1620
1621    try:
1622        schema.validate(settings)
1623    except UnboundLocalError:
1624        raise ValueError(
1625            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1626        )
1627
1628
1629def stage_position_settings(
1630    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
1631    step_name: str,
1632    general_settings: tbt.GeneralSettings,
1633    step_stage_settings: dict,
1634    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1635) -> tbt.StageSettings:
1636    """Create StagePositionUser object from settings, including validation"""
1637
1638    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1639        pos_db = step_stage_settings.get("initial_position")
1640
1641        rotation_side = step_stage_settings["rotation_side"]
1642        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(rotation_side, tbt.RotationSide):
1643            raise NotImplementedError(
1644                f"Unsupported rotation_side value of '{rotation_side}' of type '{type(rotation_side)}' in step '{step_name}', supported rotation_side values are: {[i.value for i in tbt.RotationSide]}."
1645            )
1646
1647    validate_stage_position(
1648        microscope=microscope,
1649        step_name=step_name,
1650        settings=pos_db,
1651        yml_format=yml_format,
1652    )
1653
1654    initial_position = tbt.StagePositionUser(
1655        x_mm=pos_db["x_mm"],
1656        y_mm=pos_db["y_mm"],
1657        z_mm=pos_db["z_mm"],
1658        r_deg=pos_db["r_deg"],
1659        t_deg=pos_db["t_deg"],
1660    )
1661
1662    pretilt_angle_deg = general_settings.pre_tilt_deg
1663    sectioning_axis = general_settings.sectioning_axis
1664
1665    stage_settings = tbt.StageSettings(
1666        microscope=microscope,
1667        initial_position=initial_position,
1668        pretilt_angle_deg=pretilt_angle_deg,
1669        sectioning_axis=sectioning_axis,
1670        rotation_side=tbt.RotationSide(rotation_side),
1671        # movement_mode=tbt.StageMovementMode.OUT_OF_PLANE,
1672    )
1673
1674    return stage_settings
1675
1676
1677def validate_pulse_settings(
1678    settings: dict,
1679    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1680    step_name: str,
1681) -> bool:
1682    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1683        wavelength_nm = settings.get("wavelength_nm")
1684        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(wavelength_nm, tbt.LaserWavelength):
1685            raise NotImplementedError(
1686                f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported wavelength of '{wavelength_nm}' nm (data type {type(wavelength_nm)}), supported wavelengths are: {[i.value for i in tbt.LaserWavelength]}."
1687            )
1688        polarization = settings.get("polarization")
1689        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(polarization, tbt.LaserPolarization):
1690            raise NotImplementedError(
1691                f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported laser polarization of '{polarization}', supported values are: {[i.value for i in tbt.LaserPolarization]}."
1692            )
1693
1694        schema = Schema(
1695            {
1696                "divider": And(
1697                    int,
1698                    lambda x: x > 0,
1699                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'divider' parameter must be a positive integer greater than 0 but '{settings['divider']}' was requested.",
1700                ),
1701                "energy_uj": And(
1702                    float,
1703                    lambda x: x > 0,
1704                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'energy_uj' parameter must be a positive float greater than 0 but '{settings['energy_uj']}' was requested.",
1705                ),
1706            },
1707            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1708        )
1709    try:
1710        schema.validate(settings)
1711    except UnboundLocalError:
1712        raise ValueError(
1713            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1714        )
1715
1716
1717def validate_laser_optics_settings(
1718    settings: dict,
1719    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1720    step_name: str,
1721) -> bool:
1722    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1723        schema = Schema(
1724            {
1725                "objective_position_mm": And(
1726                    float,
1727                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1728                        x,
1729                        limit=Constants.laser_objective_limit_mm,
1730                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1731                    ),
1732                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'objective_position_mm' parameter must be a float satisfying the following: {Constants.laser_objective_limit_mm.min} mm <= value <= {Constants.laser_objective_limit_mm.max} mm. '{settings['objective_position_mm']}' mm (of type {type(settings['objective_position_mm'])}) was requested.",
1733                ),
1734                "beam_shift_um_x": And(
1735                    float,
1736                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'x' parameter for 'beam_shift_um' sub-dictioanry must be a float but '{settings['beam_shift_um_x']}' (of type {type(settings['beam_shift_um_x'])}) was requested.",
1737                ),
1738                "beam_shift_um_y": And(
1739                    float,
1740                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'y' parameter for 'beam_shift_um' sub-dictioanry must be a float but '{settings['beam_shift_um_y']}' (of type {type(settings['beam_shift_um_y'])}) was requested.",
1741                ),
1742            },
1743            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1744        )
1745    try:
1746        schema.validate(settings)
1747    except UnboundLocalError:
1748        raise ValueError(
1749            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1750        )
1751
1752
1753def validate_laser_box_settings(
1754    settings: dict,
1755    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1756    step_name: str,
1757) -> bool:
1758    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1759        # scan type
1760        scan_type = settings.get("scan_type")
1761        scan_types = [
1762            tbt.LaserScanType.RASTER,
1763            tbt.LaserScanType.SERPENTINE,
1764        ]
1765        scan_type_error_msg = f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported scan type of '{scan_type}' for box pattern, supported scan types are: {[i.value for i in scan_types]}."
1766        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(scan_type, tbt.LaserScanType):
1767            raise NotImplementedError(scan_type_error_msg)
1768        if tbt.LaserScanType(scan_type) not in scan_types:
1769            raise NotImplementedError(scan_type_error_msg)
1770
1771        # coordinate reference
1772        coordinate_ref = settings.get("coordinate_ref")
1773        coord_refs = [
1774            tbt.CoordinateReference.CENTER,
1775            tbt.CoordinateReference.UPPER_CENTER,
1776            tbt.CoordinateReference.UPPER_LEFT,
1777        ]
1778        coord_error_msg = f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported coordinate reference of '{coordinate_ref}' for box pattern, supported coordinate references are: {[i.value for i in coord_refs]}."
1779        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(coordinate_ref, tbt.CoordinateReference):
1780            raise NotImplementedError(coord_error_msg)
1781        if tbt.CoordinateReference(coordinate_ref) not in coord_refs:
1782            raise NotImplementedError(coord_error_msg)
1783
1784        schema = Schema(
1785            {
1786                "passes": And(
1787                    int,
1788                    lambda x: x > 0,
1789                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'passes' parameter in 'box' type pattern must be a positive integer. '{settings['passes']}' (of type {type(settings['passes'])}) was requested.",
1790                ),
1791                "size_x_um": And(
1792                    float,
1793                    lambda x: x > 0,
1794                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'size_x_um' parameter in 'box' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['size_x_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['size_x_um'])}) was requested.",
1795                ),
1796                "size_y_um": And(
1797                    float,
1798                    lambda x: x > 0,
1799                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'size_y_um' parameter in 'box' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['size_y_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['size_y_um'])}) was requested.",
1800                ),
1801                "pitch_x_um": And(
1802                    float,
1803                    lambda x: x > 0,
1804                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'pitch_x_um' parameter in 'box' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['pitch_x_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['pitch_x_um'])}) was requested.",
1805                ),
1806                "pitch_y_um": And(
1807                    float,
1808                    lambda x: x > 0,
1809                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'pitch_y_um' parameter in 'box' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['pitch_y_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['pitch_y_um'])}) was requested.",
1810                ),
1811            },
1812            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1813        )
1814    try:
1815        schema.validate(settings)
1816    except UnboundLocalError:
1817        raise ValueError(
1818            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1819        )
1820
1821
1822def validate_laser_line_settings(
1823    settings: dict,
1824    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1825    step_name: str,
1826) -> bool:
1827    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1828        # scan type
1829        scan_type = settings.get("scan_type")
1830        scan_types = [
1831            tbt.LaserScanType.SINGLE,
1832            tbt.LaserScanType.LAP,
1833        ]
1834        scan_type_error_msg = f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported scan type of '{scan_type}' for line pattern, supported scan types are: {[i.value for i in scan_types]}."
1835        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(scan_type, tbt.LaserScanType):
1836            raise NotImplementedError(scan_type_error_msg)
1837        if tbt.LaserScanType(scan_type) not in scan_types:
1838            raise NotImplementedError(scan_type_error_msg)
1839
1840        schema = Schema(
1841            {
1842                "passes": And(
1843                    int,
1844                    lambda x: x > 0,
1845                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'passes' parameter in 'line' type pattern must be a positive integer. '{settings['passes']}' (of type {type(settings['passes'])}) was requested.",
1846                ),
1847                "size_um": And(
1848                    float,
1849                    lambda x: x > 0,
1850                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'size_um' parameter in 'line' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['size_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['size_um'])}) was requested.",
1851                ),
1852                "pitch_um": And(
1853                    float,
1854                    lambda x: x > 0,
1855                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'pitch_um' parameter in 'line' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['pitch_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['pitch_um'])}) was requested.",
1856                ),
1857            },
1858            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1859        )
1860    try:
1861        schema.validate(settings)
1862    except UnboundLocalError:
1863        raise ValueError(
1864            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1865        )
1866
1867
1868def validate_laser_mode_settings(
1869    settings: dict,
1870    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1871    step_name: str,
1872) -> bool:
1873    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1874        mode = settings.get("mode")
1875        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(mode, tbt.LaserPatternMode):
1876            raise NotImplementedError(
1877                f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported laser pattern mode of '{mode}', supported values are: {[i.value for i in tbt.LaserPatternMode]}."
1878            )
1879
1880        schema = Schema(
1881            {
1882                "rotation_deg": And(
1883                    float,
1884                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'rotation_deg' parameter must be a float. '{settings['rotation_deg']}' degrees (of type {type(settings['rotation_deg'])}) was requested.",
1885                ),
1886            },
1887            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1888        )
1889        schema_fine = Schema(
1890            {
1891                "pulses_per_pixel": And(
1892                    int,
1893                    lambda x: x > 0,
1894                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'pulses_per_pixel' parameter is required for pattern type of 'fine'. 'pulses_per_pixel' must be a positive integer greater than 0. '{settings['pulses_per_pixel']}' (of type {type(settings['pulses_per_pixel'])}) was requested.",
1895                ),
1896            },
1897            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1898        )
1899        schema_coarse = Schema(
