1900            {
1901                "pixel_dwell_ms": And(
1902                    float,
1903                    lambda x: x > 0.0,
1904                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'pixel_dwell_ms' parameter is required for pattern type of 'coarse'. 'pixel_dwell_ms' must be a positive float greater than 0. '{settings['pixel_dwell_ms']}' (of type {type(settings['pixel_dwell_ms'])}) was requested.",
1905                ),
1906            },
1907            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1908        )
1909    try:
1910        schema.validate(settings)
1911        if mode == "fine":
1912            schema_fine.validate(settings)
1913        if mode == "coarse":
1914            schema_coarse.validate(settings)
1915    except UnboundLocalError:
1916        raise ValueError(
1917            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1918        )
1919
1920
1921def validate_laser_pattern_settings(
1922    settings: dict,
1923    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1924    step_name: str,
1925) -> tbt.LaserPatternType:
1926    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1927        # determine type of pattern (only one allowed)
1928        type_set_db = settings.get("type")
1929        if type_set_db is None:
1930            raise KeyError(
1931                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'type' settings sub-dictionary found in 'pattern' settings in 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
1932            )
1933
1934        box_settings = type_set_db.get("box")
1935        line_settings = type_set_db.get("line")
1936        if box_settings is None:
1937            box_pattern = False
1938        else:
1939            box_pattern = not ut.none_value_dictionary(box_settings)
1940        if line_settings is None:
1941            line_pattern = False
1942        else:
1943            line_pattern = not ut.none_value_dictionary(line_settings)
1944        if box_pattern == line_pattern == False:
1945            raise KeyError(
1946                f"Invalid .yml file in 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}'. No pattern type settings found."
1947            )
1948        if box_pattern == line_pattern == True:
1949            raise KeyError(
1950                f"Invalid .yml file in 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}'. Pattern settings for one and only one type are allowed. Type settings found for both 'box' and 'line' type. Please leave one set of type settings completely blank, enter 'null' for each parameter, or remove the unused subdictionary completely from the .yml file."
1951            )
1952        validate_laser_mode_settings(
1953            settings=settings,
1954            yml_format=yml_format,
1955            step_name=step_name,
1956        )
1957
1958        if box_pattern:
1959            validate_laser_box_settings(
1960                settings=box_settings,
1961                yml_format=yml_format,
1962                step_name=step_name,
1963            )
1964            return tbt.LaserPatternType.BOX
1965        elif line_pattern:
1966            validate_laser_line_settings(
1967                settings=line_settings,
1968                yml_format=yml_format,
1969                step_name=step_name,
1970            )
1971            return tbt.LaserPatternType.LINE
1972        else:
1973            raise ValueError(
1974                f"Invalid laser pattern settings for step {step_name}. Supported types are {[i.value for i in tbt.LaserPatternType]}"
1975            )
1976
1977
1978def validate_fib_pattern_settings(
1979    settings: dict,
1980    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1981    step_name: str,
1982) -> Union[
1983    tbt.FIBRectanglePattern,
1984    tbt.FIBRegularCrossSection,
1985    tbt.FIBCleaningCrossSection,
1986    tbt.FIBStreamPattern,
1987]:
1988    """Schema checking for fib pattern setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1989
1990    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1991        application_file = settings.get("application_file")
1992        # determine type of pattern (only one allowed)
1993        type_set_db = settings.get("type")
1994        if type_set_db is None:
1995            raise KeyError(
1996                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'type' settings sub-dictionary found in 'pattern' settings in 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
1997            )
1998        rectangle_settings = type_set_db.get("rectangle")
1999        regular_cross_section_settings = type_set_db.get("regular_cross_section")
2000        cleaning_cross_section_settings = type_set_db.get("cleaning_cross_section")
2001        selected_area_settings = type_set_db.get("selected_area")
2002
2003        pattern_settings = [
2004            rectangle_settings,
2005            regular_cross_section_settings,
2006            cleaning_cross_section_settings,
2007            selected_area_settings,
2008        ]
2009        (
2010            rectangle_pattern,
2011            regular_cross_section_pattern,
2012            cleaning_cross_section_pattern,
2013            selected_area_pattern,
2014        ) = (None, None, None, None)
2015        # pattern_names = [val.value for val in tbt.FIBPatternType]  # remembers order
2016        # assert pattern_names == [
2017        #     "rectangle",
2018        #     "regular_cross_section",
2019        #     "cleaning_cross_section",
2020        #     "selected_area",
2021        # ]
2022        pattern_names = [
2023            "rectangle",
2024            "regular_cross_section",
2025            "cleaning_cross_section",
2026            "selected_area",
2027        ]
2028        pattern_types = [
2029            rectangle_pattern,
2030            regular_cross_section_pattern,
2031            cleaning_cross_section_pattern,
2032            selected_area_pattern,
2033        ]
2034
2035        for type in range(len(pattern_settings)):
2036            db = pattern_settings[type]
2037            if db is None:
2038                pattern_types[type] = False
2039            else:
2040                pattern_types[type] = not ut.none_value_dictionary(db)
2041
2042        # one and only one type of pattern can have settings
2043        if sum(pattern_types) != 1:
2044            raise KeyError(
2045                f"Invalid .yml file in 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}'. Pattern settings for one and only one type are allowed. Please provide settings for only one of the supported pattern types: {[name for name in pattern_names]}. For unused pattern types, leave the type settings completely blank, enter 'null' for each parameter, or remove the unused subdictionary completely from the .yml file."
2046            )
2047        pattern_type = tbt.FIBPatternType(pattern_names[pattern_types.index(True)])
2048
2049    # check application file
2050    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(application_file, tbt.FIBApplication):
2051        raise ValueError(
2052            f"Unsupported FIB application file type of '{application_file}' on step '{step_name}'"
2053        )
2054
2055    if pattern_type == tbt.FIBPatternType.RECTANGLE:
2056        validate_fib_box_settings(
2057            settings=rectangle_settings,
2058            yml_format=yml_format,
2059            step_name=step_name,
2060            pattern_type=pattern_type,
2061        )
2062
2063        pattern = tbt.FIBPattern(
2064            application=tbt.FIBApplication(application_file),
2065            type=pattern_type,
2066            geometry=tbt.FIBRectanglePattern(
2067                center_um=tbt.Point(
2068                    x=rectangle_settings.get("center").get("x_um"),
2069                    y=rectangle_settings.get("center").get("y_um"),
2070                ),
2071                width_um=rectangle_settings.get("width_um"),
2072                height_um=rectangle_settings.get("height_um"),
2073                depth_um=rectangle_settings.get("depth_um"),
2074                scan_direction=tbt.FIBPatternScanDirection(
2075                    rectangle_settings.get("scan_direction")
2076                ),
2077                scan_type=tbt.FIBPatternScanType(rectangle_settings.get("scan_type")),
2078            ),
2079        )
2080        return pattern
2081    elif pattern_type == tbt.FIBPatternType.REGULAR_CROSS_SECTION:
2082        validate_fib_box_settings(
2083            settings=regular_cross_section_settings,
2084            yml_format=yml_format,
2085            step_name=step_name,
2086            pattern_type=pattern_type,
2087        )
2088        pattern = tbt.FIBPattern(
2089            application=tbt.FIBApplication(application_file),
2090            type=pattern_type,
2091            geometry=tbt.FIBRegularCrossSection(
2092                center_um=tbt.Point(
2093                    x=regular_cross_section_settings.get("center").get("x_um"),
2094                    y=regular_cross_section_settings.get("center").get("y_um"),
2095                ),
2096                width_um=regular_cross_section_settings.get("width_um"),
2097                height_um=regular_cross_section_settings.get("height_um"),
2098                depth_um=regular_cross_section_settings.get("depth_um"),
2099                scan_direction=tbt.FIBPatternScanDirection(
2100                    regular_cross_section_settings.get("scan_direction")
2101                ),
2102                scan_type=tbt.FIBPatternScanType(
2103                    regular_cross_section_settings.get("scan_type")
2104                ),
2105            ),
2106        )
2107        return pattern
2108    elif pattern_type == tbt.FIBPatternType.CLEANING_CROSS_SECTION:
2109        validate_fib_box_settings(
2110            settings=cleaning_cross_section_settings,
2111            yml_format=yml_format,
2112            step_name=step_name,
2113            pattern_type=pattern_type,
2114        )
2115        pattern = tbt.FIBPattern(
2116            application=tbt.FIBApplication(application_file),
2117            type=pattern_type,
2118            geometry=tbt.FIBCleaningCrossSection(
2119                center_um=tbt.Point(
2120                    x=cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("center").get("x_um"),
2121                    y=cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("center").get("y_um"),
2122                ),
2123                width_um=cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("width_um"),
2124                height_um=cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("height_um"),
2125                depth_um=cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("depth_um"),
2126                scan_direction=tbt.FIBPatternScanDirection(
2127                    cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("scan_direction")
2128                ),
2129                scan_type=tbt.FIBPatternScanType(
2130                    cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("scan_type")
2131                ),
2132            ),
2133        )
2134        return pattern
2135    elif pattern_type == tbt.FIBPatternType.SELECTED_AREA:
2136        validate_fib_selected_area_settings(
2137            settings=selected_area_settings,
2138            yml_format=yml_format,
2139            step_name=step_name,
2140            pattern_type=pattern_type,
2141        )
2142        pattern = tbt.FIBPattern(
2143            application=tbt.FIBApplication(application_file),
2144            type=pattern_type,
2145            geometry=tbt.FIBStreamPattern(
2146                dwell_us=selected_area_settings.get("dwell_us"),
2147                repeats=selected_area_settings.get("repeats"),
2148                recipe=Path(selected_area_settings.get("recipe_file")),
2149                mask=Path(selected_area_settings.get("mask_file")),
2150            ),
2151        )
2152        return pattern
2153    else:
2154        raise KeyError(
2155            f"Invalid pattern type of {pattern_type}. Supported pattern types are: {[i.value for i in tbt.FIBPatternType]}"
2156        )
2157
2158
2159def validate_fib_box_settings(
2160    settings: dict,
2161    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
2162    step_name: str,
2163    pattern_type: tbt.FIBPatternType,
2164) -> bool:
2165    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
2166        # flattens nested dictionary, adding "_" separator
2167        flat_settings = ut._flatten(settings)
2168        schema = Schema(
2169            {
2170                "center_x_um": And(
2171                    float,
2172                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'x_um' parameter for pattern 'center' sub-dictionary must be a float. '{flat_settings['center_x_um']}' of type '{type(flat_settings['center_x_um'])}' was requested.",
2173                ),
2174                "center_y_um": And(
2175                    float,
2176                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'y_um' parameter for pattern 'center' sub-dictionary must be a float. '{flat_settings['center_y_um']}' of type '{type(flat_settings['center_y_um'])}' was requested.",
2177                ),
2178                "width_um": And(
2179                    float,
2180                    lambda x: x > 0,
2181                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'width_um' parameter must be a float. '{flat_settings['width_um']}' of type '{type(flat_settings['width_um'])}' was requested.",
2182                ),
2183                "height_um": And(
2184                    float,
2185                    lambda x: x > 0,
2186                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'height_um' parameter must be a float. '{flat_settings['height_um']}' of type '{type(flat_settings['height_um'])}' was requested.",
2187                ),
2188                "depth_um": And(
2189                    float,
2190                    lambda x: x > 0,
2191                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'depth_um' parameter must be a float. '{flat_settings['depth_um']}' of type '{type(flat_settings['depth_um'])}' was requested.",
2192                ),
2193                "scan_direction": And(
2194                    str,
2195                    lambda x: ut.valid_enum_entry(x, tbt.FIBPatternScanDirection),
2196                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'scan_direction' parameter must be a valid scan direction type. '{flat_settings['scan_direction']}' was requested but supported values are: {[i.value for i in tbt.FIBPatternScanDirection]}",
2197                ),
2198                "scan_type": And(
2199                    str,
2200                    lambda x: ut.valid_enum_entry(x, tbt.FIBPatternScanType),
2201                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'scan_type' parameter must be a valid scan type type. '{flat_settings['scan_type']}' was requested but supported values are: {[i.value for i in tbt.FIBPatternScanType]}",
2202                ),
2203            },
2204            ignore_extra_keys=True,
2205        )
2206    try:
2207        schema.validate(flat_settings)
2208    except UnboundLocalError:
2209        raise ValueError(
2210            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
2211        )
2212    return True
2213
2214
2215def validate_fib_selected_area_settings(
2216    settings: dict,
2217    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
2218    step_name: str,
2219    pattern_type: tbt.FIBPatternType,
2220) -> bool:
2221    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
2222        schema = Schema(
2223            {
2224                "dwell_us": And(
2225                    float,
2226                    lambda x: x > 0,
2227                    # check all float error versions of modulus
2228                    Or(
2229                        lambda x: math.isclose(
2230                            x % Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us,
2231                            0,
2232                            abs_tol=Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us / 1e5,
2233                        ),
2234                        lambda x: math.isclose(
2235                            x % Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us,
2236                            Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us,
2237                            abs_tol=Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us / 1e5,
2238                        ),
2239                        lambda x: math.isclose(
2240                            x % Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us,
2241                            -Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us,
2242                            abs_tol=Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us / 1e5,
2243                        ),
2244                    ),
2245                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'dwell_us' parameter must be a positive float and an integer multiple of the base dwell time, { Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us * Conversions.US_TO_NS} ns. '{settings['dwell_us']}' us of type '{type(settings['dwell_us'])}' was requested.",
2246                ),
2247                "repeats": And(
2248                    int,
2249                    lambda x: x > 0,
2250                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'repeats' parameter must be a positive integer. '{settings['repeats']}' of type '{type(settings['repeats'])}' was requested.",
2251                ),
2252                "recipe_file": And(
2253                    str,
2254                    lambda x: Path(x).is_file(),
2255                    lambda x: Path(x).suffix == ".py",
2256                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'recipe_file' parameter must be a valid file path string with the extension '.py' and must already exist. The recipe file '{settings['recipe_file']}' was requested.",
2257                ),
2258                "mask_file": And(
2259                    str,
2260                    lambda x: Path(x).suffix == ".tif",
2261                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'mask' parameter must be a file path string with a file extension of '.tif'. '{settings['mask_file']}' of type '{type(settings['mask_file'])}' was requested.",
2262                ),
2263            },
2264            ignore_extra_keys=True,
2265        )
2266    try:
2267        schema.validate(settings)
2268    except UnboundLocalError:
2269        raise ValueError(
2270            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
2271        )
2272    return True
2273
2274
2275def step(
2276    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
2277    # slice_number: str,
2278    step_name: str,
2279    step_settings: dict,
2280    general_settings: tbt.GeneralSettings,
2281    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
2282) -> tbt.Step:
2283    """Create step object for different step types, including validation."""
2284
2285    # parsing settings
2286    step_type_value = step_settings[yml_format.step_general_key][
2287        yml_format.step_type_key
2288    ]
2289    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(step_type_value, tbt.StepType):
2290        raise NotImplementedError(
2291            f"Unsupported step type of '{step_type_value}', for step name '{step_name}' supported types are: {[i.value for i in tbt.StepType]}."
2292        )
2293    step_type = tbt.StepType(step_type_value)
2294
2295    step_number = step_settings[yml_format.step_general_key][yml_format.step_number_key]
2296    if not isinstance(step_number, int) or (step_number < 1):
2297        raise KeyError(
2298            f"Invalid step number of '{step_number}', for step name '{step_name}'. Must be a positive integer greater than 0."
2299        )
2300    step_frequency = step_settings[yml_format.step_general_key][
2301        yml_format.step_frequency_key
2302    ]
2303    if not isinstance(step_frequency, int) or (step_frequency < 1):
2304        raise KeyError(
2305            f"Invalid step frequency of '{step_frequency}', for step name '{step_name}'. Must be a positive integer greater than 0."
2306        )
2307    stage_db = step_settings[yml_format.step_general_key][
2308        yml_format.step_stage_settings_key
2309    ]
2310
2311    # check and validate stage
2312    stage_settings = stage_position_settings(
2313        microscope=microscope,
2314        step_name=step_name,
2315        general_settings=general_settings,
2316        step_stage_settings=stage_db,
2317        yml_format=yml_format,
2318    )
2319
2320    # TODO
2321    # operation_settings, could use match statement in python >= 3.10
2322    if step_type == tbt.StepType.EBSD:
2323        operation_settings = ebsd(
2324            microscope=microscope,
2325            step_settings=step_settings,
2326            step_name=step_name,
2327            yml_format=yml_format,
2328        )
2329    if step_type == tbt.StepType.EDS:
2330        operation_settings = eds(
2331            microscope=microscope,
2332            step_settings=step_settings,
2333            step_name=step_name,
2334            yml_format=yml_format,
2335        )
2336    if step_type == tbt.StepType.IMAGE:
2337        operation_settings = image(
2338            microscope=microscope,
2339            step_settings=step_settings,
2340            step_name=step_name,
2341            yml_format=yml_format,
2342        )
2343    if step_type == tbt.StepType.LASER:
2344        operation_settings = laser(
2345            microscope=microscope,
2346            step_settings=step_settings,
2347            step_name=step_name,
2348            yml_format=yml_format,
2349        )
2350    if step_type == tbt.StepType.CUSTOM:
2351        operation_settings = custom(
2352            microscope=microscope,
2353            step_settings=step_settings,
2354            step_name=step_name,
2355            yml_format=yml_format,
2356        )
2357    if step_type == tbt.StepType.FIB:
2358        operation_settings = fib(
2359            microscope=microscope,
2360            step_settings=step_settings,
2361            step_name=step_name,
2362            yml_format=yml_format,
2363        )
2364
2365    step_object = tbt.Step(
2366        type=step_type,
2367        name=step_name,
2368        number=step_number,
2369        frequency=step_frequency,
2370        stage=stage_settings,
2371        operation_settings=operation_settings,
2372    )
2373
2374    return step_object
def active_beam_with_settings(microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope) -> pytribeam.types.Beam: 
31def active_beam_with_settings(
32    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
33) -> tbt.Beam:
34    """Beam factory
35    This will grab current beam and its settings on the microscope to make a beam object. These settings will fully depend on the currently active beam as determined by xTUI. Tolerance values for voltage and current will be autopopulated as a ratio of current values predetermined in the constants.Constants() class.
36    """
37    selected_beam = active_imaging_device(microscope=microscope)
38    beam = ut.beam_type(selected_beam, microscope)
39
40    voltage_kv = beam.high_voltage.value * Conversions.V_TO_KV
41    voltage_tol_kv = voltage_kv * Constants.voltage_tol_ratio
42
43    current_na = beam.beam_current.value * Conversions.A_TO_NA
44    current_tol_na = current_na * Constants.current_tol_ratio
45
46    hfw_mm = beam.horizontal_field_width.value * Conversions.M_TO_MM
47
48    working_dist_mm = beam.working_distance.value * Conversions.M_TO_MM
49
50    active_settings = tbt.BeamSettings(
51        voltage_kv=voltage_kv,
52        current_na=current_na,
53        hfw_mm=hfw_mm,
54        working_dist_mm=working_dist_mm,
55        voltage_tol_kv=voltage_tol_kv,
56        current_tol_na=current_tol_na,
57    )
58
59    return type(selected_beam)(settings=active_settings)

Beam factory This will grab current beam and its settings on the microscope to make a beam object. These settings will fully depend on the currently active beam as determined by xTUI. Tolerance values for voltage and current will be autopopulated as a ratio of current values predetermined in the constants.Constants() class.

def active_detector_settings(microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope) -> pytribeam.types.Detector: 
62def active_detector_settings(
63    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
64) -> tbt.Detector:
65    """Detector factory
66    This will grab current detector settings on the microscope to make a detector object. These settings will fully depend on the currently active detector as determined by xTUI.
67    """
68
69    detector_type = microscope.detector.type.value
70    detector_mode = microscope.detector.mode.value
71    brightness = microscope.detector.brightness.value
72    contrast = microscope.detector.contrast.value
73    auto_cb_settings = tbt.ScanArea(
74        left=None,
75        top=None,
76        width=None,
77        height=None,
78    )
79    custom_settings = None
80
81    active_detector = tbt.Detector(
82        type=detector_type,
83        mode=detector_mode,
84        brightness=brightness,
85        contrast=contrast,
86        auto_cb_settings=auto_cb_settings,
87        custom_settings=custom_settings,
88    )
89
90    return active_detector

Detector factory This will grab current detector settings on the microscope to make a detector object. These settings will fully depend on the currently active detector as determined by xTUI.

def active_image_settings(microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope) -> pytribeam.types.ImageSettings: 
 93def active_image_settings(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> tbt.ImageSettings:
 94    """"""
 95    beam = active_beam_with_settings(microscope=microscope)
 96    detector = active_detector_settings(microscope=microscope)
 97    scan = active_scan_settings(microscope=microscope)
 98    bit_depth = Constants.default_color_depth
 99
100    active_image_settings = tbt.ImageSettings(
101        microscope=microscope,
102        beam=beam,
103        detector=detector,
104        scan=scan,
105        bit_depth=bit_depth,
106    )
107
108    return active_image_settings
def active_imaging_device(microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope) -> pytribeam.types.Beam: 
111def active_imaging_device(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> tbt.Beam:
112    """Determines active imaging device and returns correct internal beam type object with null beam settings"""
113    curr_device = tbt.Device(microscope.imaging.get_active_device())
114    if curr_device == tbt.Device.ELECTRON_BEAM:
115        selected_beam = beam_object_type(type=tbt.BeamType.ELECTRON)(
116            settings=tbt.BeamSettings()
117        )
118    elif curr_device == tbt.Device.ION_BEAM:
119        selected_beam = beam_object_type(type=tbt.BeamType.ION)(
120            settings=tbt.BeamSettings()
121        )
122    else:
123        raise ValueError(
124            f"Currently selected device {curr_device}, make sure a quadrant in xTUI with either an Electron beam or Ion beam active is selected."
125        )
126    return selected_beam

Determines active imaging device and returns correct internal beam type object with null beam settings

def active_scan_settings(microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope) -> pytribeam.types.Scan: 
129def active_scan_settings(
130    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
131) -> tbt.Scan:
132    """Scan factory
133    This will grab current scan settings on the microscope to make a scan object. These settings will fully depend on the currently active scan settings as determined by xTUI.
134    """
135    selected_beam = active_imaging_device(microscope=microscope)
136    beam = ut.beam_type(selected_beam, microscope)
137
138    rotation_deg = beam.scanning.rotation.value * Conversions.RAD_TO_DEG
139    dwell_time_us = beam.scanning.dwell_time.value * Conversions.S_TO_US
140    current_res = beam.scanning.resolution.value
141    res = string_to_res(current_res)
142    resolution = tbt.PresetResolution(res)
143
144    active_scan = tbt.Scan(
145        rotation_deg=rotation_deg,
146        dwell_time_us=dwell_time_us,
147        resolution=resolution,
148        # mode=mode,
149    )
150
151    return active_scan

Scan factory This will grab current scan settings on the microscope to make a scan object. These settings will fully depend on the currently active scan settings as determined by xTUI.

def active_stage_position_settings( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope) -> pytribeam.types.StagePositionUser: 
154def active_stage_position_settings(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> tbt.StagePositionUser:
155    """Returns current stage position in raw coordinate system and user units [mm, deg]"""
156    stage.coordinate_system(microscope=microscope, mode=tbt.StageCoordinateSystem.RAW)
157    # encoder positions (pos) are in meters and radians
158    direct_encoder_pos = microscope.specimen.stage.current_position
159    x_m, y_m, z_m = direct_encoder_pos.x, direct_encoder_pos.y, direct_encoder_pos.z
160    r_rad, t_rad = direct_encoder_pos.r, direct_encoder_pos.t
161    coord_system_str = direct_encoder_pos.coordinate_system
162
163    encoder_pos = tbt.StagePositionEncoder(
164        x=x_m, y=y_m, z=z_m, r=r_rad, t=t_rad, coordinate_system=coord_system_str
165    )
166    user_pos = stage.encoder_to_user_position(encoder_pos)
167
168    # ensure r-axis is kept in axis limit
169    if not ut.in_interval(
170        val=user_pos.r_deg,
171        limit=Constants.rotation_axis_limit_deg,
172        type=tbt.IntervalType.RIGHT_OPEN,
173    ):
174        # used as right-open internal: 180.0 is not valid and should be converted to -180.0
175        while user_pos.r_deg >= Constants.rotation_axis_limit_deg.max:
176            new_r_deg = user_pos.r_deg - 360.0
177        while user_pos.r_deg < Constants.rotation_axis_limit_deg.min:
178            new_r_deg = user_pos.r_deg + 360.0
179        user_pos = tbt.StagePositionUser(
180            x_mm=user_pos.x_mm,
181            y_mm=user_pos.y_mm,
182            z_mm=user_pos.z_mm,
183            r_deg=new_r_deg,
184            t_deg=user_pos.t_deg,
185        )
186
187    return user_pos

Returns current stage position in raw coordinate system and user units [mm, deg]

def active_laser_state() -> pytribeam.types.LaserState: 
190def active_laser_state() -> tbt.LaserState:
191    """returns dictionary object for all properties that can be quickly read from the laser (not exhaustive)
192    Power can be read but has its own method and is more involved.
193    Flipper configuration can only be set, not read"""
194    vals = tfs_laser.Laser_ReadValues()
195    vals["objective_position_mm"] = tfs_laser.LIP_GetZPosition()
196    vals["beam_shift_um_x"] = tfs_laser.BeamShift_Get_X()
197    vals["beam_shift_um_y"] = tfs_laser.BeamShift_Get_Y()
198    vals["shutter_state"] = tfs_laser.Shutter_GetState()
199    vals["pattern"] = tfs_laser.Patterning_ReadValues()
200    vals["expected_pattern_duration_s"] = tfs_laser.Patterning_GetExpectedDuration()
201
202    pattern_db = vals["pattern"]
203    pattern_type = pattern_db["patternType"].lower()
204    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(pattern_type, tbt.LaserPatternType):
205        raise KeyError(
206            f"Unsupported LaserPatternType of {pattern_type}, supported types include: {[i.value for i in tbt.LaserPatternType]}"
207        )
208    pattern_type = tbt.LaserPatternType(pattern_type)
209    mode = tbt.LaserPatternMode(pattern_db["patterningMode"].lower())
210    if mode == tbt.LaserPatternMode.COARSE:
211        pixel_dwell_ms = pattern_db["dwellTime"]
212        pulses_per_pixel = None
213    elif mode == tbt.LaserPatternMode.FINE:
214        pixel_dwell_ms = None
215        pulses_per_pixel = pattern_db["pulsesPerPixel"]
216    rotation_deg = pattern_db["patternRotation_deg"]
217
218    if pattern_type == tbt.LaserPatternType.BOX:
219        geometry = tbt.LaserBoxPattern(
220            passes=pattern_db["passes"],
221            size_x_um=pattern_db["xSize_um"],
222            size_y_um=pattern_db["ySize_um"],
223            pitch_x_um=pattern_db["xPitch_um"],
224            pitch_y_um=pattern_db["yPitch_um"],
225            scan_type=tbt.LaserScanType(pattern_db["scanningMode"].lower()),
226            coordinate_ref=tbt.CoordinateReference(
227                pattern_db["coordReference"].lower()
228            ),
229        )
230    if pattern_type == tbt.LaserPatternType.LINE:
231        geometry = tbt.LaserLinePattern(
232            passes=pattern_db["passes"],
233            size_um=pattern_db["xSize_um"],
234            pitch_um=pattern_db["xPitch_um"],
235            scan_type=tbt.LaserScanType(pattern_db["scanningMode"].lower()),
236        )
237
238    pattern = tbt.LaserPattern(
239        mode=mode,
240        rotation_deg=rotation_deg,
241        geometry=geometry,
242        pulses_per_pixel=pulses_per_pixel,
243        pixel_dwell_ms=pixel_dwell_ms,
244    )
245
246    state = tbt.LaserState(
247        wavelength_nm=vals["wavelength_nm"],
248        frequency_khz=vals["frequency_kHz"],
249        pulse_divider=vals["pulse_divider"],
250        pulse_energy_uj=vals["pulse_energy_uJ"],
251        objective_position_mm=vals["objective_position_mm"],
252        beam_shift_um=tbt.Point(x=vals["beam_shift_um_x"], y=vals["beam_shift_um_y"]),
253        pattern=pattern,
254        expected_pattern_duration_s=vals["expected_pattern_duration_s"],
255    )
256
257    return state

returns dictionary object for all properties that can be quickly read from the laser (not exhaustive) Power can be read but has its own method and is more involved. Flipper configuration can only be set, not read

def active_laser_settings(microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope) -> pytribeam.types.LaserSettings: 
260def active_laser_settings(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> tbt.LaserSettings:
261    """Laser Settings factory. Some values cannot be read by Laser Control, only set. For example, Polarization will default to "Vertical" as this value cannot be read"""
262    state = active_laser_state()
263
264    settings = tbt.LaserSettings(
265        microscope=microscope,
266        pulse=tbt.LaserPulse(
267            wavelength_nm=state.wavelength_nm,
268            divider=state.pulse_divider,
269            energy_uj=state.pulse_energy_uj,
270            polarization=tbt.LaserPolarization.VERTICAL,  # TODO, can't read this, can only set it
271        ),
272        objective_position_mm=state.objective_position_mm,
273        beam_shift_um=state.beam_shift_um,
274        pattern=state.pattern,
275    )
276
277    return settings

Laser Settings factory. Some values cannot be read by Laser Control, only set. For example, Polarization will default to "Vertical" as this value cannot be read

def available_detector_types(microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope) -> List[str]: 
280def available_detector_types(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> List[str]:
281    """Returns available detector types on the current microscope"""
282    detectors = microscope.detector.type.available_values
283    # available = [tbt.DetectorType(i) for i in detectors]
284    return detectors

Returns available detector types on the current microscope

def available_detector_modes(microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope) -> List[str]: 
287def available_detector_modes(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> List[str]:
288    """Returns available detector modes on the current microscope"""
289    modes = microscope.detector.mode.available_values
290    # available = [tbt.DetectorType(i) for i in modes]
291    return modes

Returns available detector modes on the current microscope

def beam_object_type(type: pytribeam.types.BeamType) -> pytribeam.types.Beam: 
294def beam_object_type(type: tbt.BeamType) -> tbt.Beam:
295    if type.value == "electron":
296        return tbt.ElectronBeam
297    if type.value == "ion":
298        return tbt.IonBeam
299    raise NotImplementedError(f"Unsupported beam type {type.value}")
def stage_limits(microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope) -> pytribeam.types.StageLimits: 
302def stage_limits(microscope: tbt.Microscope) -> tbt.StageLimits:
303    """stage limits from current microscope connection"""
304    stage.coordinate_system(microscope=microscope)
305    # x position
306    min_x_mm = (
307        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.X).min
308        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
309    )
310    max_x_mm = (
311        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.X).max
312        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
313    )
314    # y position
315    min_y_mm = (
316        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.Y).min
317        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
318    )
319    max_y_mm = (
320        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.Y).max
321        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
322    )
323    # z position
324    min_z_mm = (
325        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.Z).min
326        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
327    )
328    max_z_mm = (
329        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.Z).max
330        * Conversions.M_TO_MM
331    )
332    # r position
333    min_r_deg = Constants.rotation_axis_limit_deg.min
334    max_r_deg = Constants.rotation_axis_limit_deg.max
335    # t position
336    min_t_deg = (
337        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.T).min
338        * Conversions.RAD_TO_DEG
339    )
340    max_t_deg = (
341        microscope.specimen.stage.get_axis_limits(tbt.StageAxis.T).max
342        * Conversions.RAD_TO_DEG
343    )
344
345    return tbt.StageLimits(
346        x_mm=tbt.Limit(min=min_x_mm, max=max_x_mm),
347        y_mm=tbt.Limit(min=min_y_mm, max=max_y_mm),
348        z_mm=tbt.Limit(min=min_z_mm, max=max_z_mm),
349        r_deg=tbt.Limit(min=min_r_deg, max=max_r_deg),
350        t_deg=tbt.Limit(min=min_t_deg, max=max_t_deg),
351    )

stage limits from current microscope connection

def beam_limits( selected_beam: property, beam_type: pytribeam.types.BeamType) -> pytribeam.types.BeamLimits: 
354def beam_limits(
355    selected_beam: property,
356    beam_type: tbt.BeamType,
357) -> tbt.BeamLimits:
358    # voltage range
359    min_kv = selected_beam.high_voltage.limits.min * Conversions.V_TO_KV
360    max_kv = selected_beam.high_voltage.limits.max * Conversions.V_TO_KV
361
362    # current range
363    if beam_type == tbt.BeamType.ELECTRON:
364        min_na = selected_beam.beam_current.limits.min * Conversions.A_TO_NA
365        max_na = selected_beam.beam_current.limits.max * Conversions.A_TO_NA
366    if beam_type == tbt.BeamType.ION:
367        available_currents = selected_beam.beam_current.available_values
368        min_na = min(available_currents) * Conversions.A_TO_NA
369        max_na = max(available_currents) * Conversions.A_TO_NA
370
371    # hfw range
372    min_hfw_mm = selected_beam.horizontal_field_width.limits.min * Conversions.M_TO_MM
373    max_hfw_mm = selected_beam.horizontal_field_width.limits.max * Conversions.M_TO_MM
374
375    # working_dist range
376    min_wd_mm = selected_beam.working_distance.limits.min * Conversions.M_TO_MM
377    max_wd_mm = selected_beam.working_distance.limits.max * Conversions.M_TO_MM
378
379    return tbt.BeamLimits(
380        voltage_kv=tbt.Limit(min=min_kv, max=max_kv),
381        current_na=tbt.Limit(min=min_na, max=max_na),
382        hfw_mm=tbt.Limit(min=min_hfw_mm, max=max_hfw_mm),
383        working_distance_mm=tbt.Limit(min=min_wd_mm, max=max_wd_mm),
384    )
def general( general_db: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> pytribeam.types.GeneralSettings: 
387def general(
388    general_db: dict,
389    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
390) -> tbt.GeneralSettings:
391    """Converts general setting dictionary to built-in type.
392    Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested.
393
394    Args:
395        general_db: general settings dictioanry from .yml
396        yml_format: format specified by version of the .yml file
397
398    Returns:
399        general settings
400    """
401
402    if not yml_format in tbt.YMLFormatVersion:
403        raise NotImplementedError(
404            """Due to the complexity and number of variables, 
405        image objects should only be constructed using a yml file."""
406        )
407    if not isinstance(yml_format, tbt.YMLFormatVersion):
408        raise NotImplementedError(f"Unsupported yml format of {yml_format}.")
409
410    validate_general_settings(
411        settings=general_db,
412        yml_format=yml_format,
413    )
414
415    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
416        # slice thickness
417        slice_thickness_um = general_db["slice_thickness_um"]
418        # max slice number
419        max_slice_number = general_db["max_slice_num"]
420        # pre tilt
421        pre_tilt_deg = general_db["pre_tilt_deg"]
422        # sectioning axis
423        sectioning_axis = tbt.SectioningAxis(general_db["sectioning_axis"])
424        # stage tolerance
425        stage_tolerance = tbt.StageTolerance(
426            translational_um=general_db["stage_translational_tol_um"],
427            angular_deg=general_db["stage_angular_tol_deg"],
428        )
429        # connection
430        connection = tbt.MicroscopeConnection(
431            general_db["connection_host"], general_db["connection_port"]
432        )
433        # EBSD OEM
434        ebsd_oem = tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(general_db["EBSD_OEM"])
435        # EDS OEM
436        eds_oem = tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(general_db["EDS_OEM"])
437        # exp dir
438        exp_dir = general_db["exp_dir"]
439        # h5 log name
440        h5_log_name = general_db["h5_log_name"]
441        # remove log file extension if the user provided it
442        log_extension = Constants.logfile_extension
443        if h5_log_name.endswith(log_extension):
444            h5_log_name = h5_log_name[: -len(log_extension)]
445        # step count
446        step_count = general_db["step_count"]
447
448    general_settings = tbt.GeneralSettings(
449        slice_thickness_um=slice_thickness_um,
450        max_slice_number=max_slice_number,
451        pre_tilt_deg=pre_tilt_deg,
452        sectioning_axis=sectioning_axis,
453        stage_tolerance=stage_tolerance,
454        connection=connection,
455        EBSD_OEM=ebsd_oem,
456        EDS_OEM=eds_oem,
457        exp_dir=Path(exp_dir),
458        h5_log_name=h5_log_name,
459        step_count=step_count,
460    )
461
462    return general_settings

Converts general setting dictionary to built-in type. Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested.

Args: general_db: general settings dictioanry from .yml yml_format: format specified by version of the .yml file

Returns: general settings

def laser_box_pattern(settings: dict) -> pytribeam.types.LaserBoxPattern: 
465def laser_box_pattern(settings: dict) -> tbt.LaserBoxPattern:
466    # if settings is None or ut.none_value_dictionary(dictionary=settings):
467    #     return tbt.LaserBoxPattern()
468    return tbt.LaserBoxPattern(
469        passes=settings["passes"],
470        size_x_um=settings["size_x_um"],
471        size_y_um=settings["size_y_um"],
472        pitch_x_um=settings["pitch_x_um"],
473        pitch_y_um=settings["pitch_y_um"],
474        scan_type=tbt.LaserScanType(settings["scan_type"]),
475        coordinate_ref=tbt.CoordinateReference(settings["coordinate_ref"]),
476    )
def laser_line_pattern(settings: dict) -> pytribeam.types.LaserBoxPattern: 
479def laser_line_pattern(settings: dict) -> tbt.LaserBoxPattern:
480    # if settings is None or ut.none_value_dictionary(dictionary=settings):
481    #     return tbt.LaserLinePattern()
482    return tbt.LaserLinePattern(
483        passes=settings["passes"],
484        size_um=settings["size_um"],
485        pitch_um=settings["pitch_um"],
486        scan_type=tbt.LaserScanType(settings["scan_type"]),
487    )
def laser( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, step_settings: dict, step_name: str, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> pytribeam.types.LaserSettings: 
490def laser(
491    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
492    step_settings: dict,
493    step_name: str,
494    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
495) -> tbt.LaserSettings:
496    """Coverts laser step from .yml to microscope settings to perform laser milling. Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested"""
497    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
498        # pulse settings
499        pulse_set_db = step_settings.get("pulse")
500        if pulse_set_db is None:
501            raise KeyError(
502                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'pulse' settings found in 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
503            )
504        # laser optics settings
505        optics_set_db = {
506            "objective_position_mm": step_settings.get("objective_position_mm"),
507            "beam_shift_um_x": step_settings.get("beam_shift").get("x_um"),
508            "beam_shift_um_y": step_settings.get("beam_shift").get("y_um"),
509        }
510        # pattern settings
511        pattern_set_db = step_settings.get("pattern")
512        if pattern_set_db is None:
513            raise KeyError(
514                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'pattern' settings found in 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
515            )
516        line_pattern_db = pattern_set_db.get("type").get("line")
517        box_pattern_db = pattern_set_db.get("type").get("box")
518
519    validate_pulse_settings(
520        settings=pulse_set_db,
521        yml_format=yml_format,
522        step_name=step_name,
523    )
524    pulse = tbt.LaserPulse(
525        wavelength_nm=tbt.LaserWavelength(pulse_set_db["wavelength_nm"]),
526        divider=pulse_set_db["divider"],
527        energy_uj=pulse_set_db["energy_uj"],
528        polarization=tbt.LaserPolarization(pulse_set_db["polarization"]),
529    )
530
531    validate_laser_optics_settings(
532        settings=optics_set_db,
533        yml_format=yml_format,
534        step_name=step_name,
535    )
536
537    pattern_type = validate_laser_pattern_settings(
538        settings=pattern_set_db,
539        yml_format=yml_format,
540        step_name=step_name,
541    )
542    if pattern_type == tbt.LaserPatternType.BOX:
543        geometry = laser_box_pattern(box_pattern_db)
544    if pattern_type == tbt.LaserPatternType.LINE:
545        geometry = laser_line_pattern(line_pattern_db)
546    pattern = tbt.LaserPattern(
547        mode=tbt.LaserPatternMode(pattern_set_db["mode"]),
548        rotation_deg=pattern_set_db["rotation_deg"],
549        pulses_per_pixel=pattern_set_db["pulses_per_pixel"],
550        pixel_dwell_ms=pattern_set_db["pixel_dwell_ms"],
551        geometry=geometry,
552    )
553
554    laser_settings = tbt.LaserSettings(
555        microscope=microscope,
556        pulse=pulse,
557        objective_position_mm=optics_set_db["objective_position_mm"],
558        beam_shift_um=tbt.Point(
559            x=optics_set_db["beam_shift_um_x"],
560            y=optics_set_db["beam_shift_um_y"],
561        ),
562        pattern=pattern,
563    )
564
565    return laser_settings

Coverts laser step from .yml to microscope settings to perform laser milling. Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested

def image( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, step_settings: dict, step_name: str, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> pytribeam.types.ImageSettings: 
568def image(
569    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
570    step_settings: dict,
571    step_name: str,
572    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
573) -> tbt.ImageSettings:
574    """Converts image step from .yml file to microscope settings
575    to capture an image. Performs schema checking to ensure valid
576    inputs are requested.
577
578    Args:
579        microscope: the connection to the microscope
580        step_settings: image step dictioanry from a .yml file
581        yml_format: format specified by version of the .yml file
582
583    Returns:
584        image settings
585    """
586    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
587        step_general = step_settings.get(yml_format.step_general_key)
588        if step_general is None:
589            raise KeyError(
590                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'step_general' settings found in step '{step_name}'."
591            )
592        step_type = step_general.get(yml_format.step_type_key)
593        if step_type is None:
594            raise KeyError(
595                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'step_type' settings found in step '{step_name}'."
596            )
597        # beam settings
598        beam_set_db = step_settings.get("beam")
599        if beam_set_db is None:
600            raise KeyError(
601                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'beam' settings found in '{step_type}' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
602            )
603        beam_type_value = beam_set_db.get("type")
604        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(beam_type_value, tbt.BeamType):
605            raise NotImplementedError(
606                f"Unsupported beam type of '{beam_type_value}', supported beam types are: {[i.value for i in tbt.BeamType]}."
607            )
608        beam_type = tbt.BeamType(beam_set_db.get("type"))
609
610        # detector settings
611        detector_set_db = step_settings.get("detector")
612        if detector_set_db is None:
613            raise KeyError(
614                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'detector' settings found in '{step_type}' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
615            )
616        auto_cb_set_db = detector_set_db.get("auto_cb")
617
618        # scan settings
619        scan_set_db = step_settings.get("scan")
620        if scan_set_db is None:
621            raise KeyError(
622                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'scan' settings found in '{step_type}' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
623            )
624        scan_res = string_to_res(scan_set_db.get("resolution"))
625
626        # misc settings
627        bit_depth = step_settings.get("bit_depth")
628
629    # TODO incorporate tile settings
630    if yml_format.version >= 1.1:
631        # tile settings
632        tile_set_db = step_settings.get("tile_settings")
633
634    validate_beam_settings(
635        microscope=microscope,
636        beam_type=beam_type,
637        settings=beam_set_db,
638        yml_format=yml_format,
639        step_name=step_name,
640    )
641    beam_settings = tbt.BeamSettings(
642        voltage_kv=beam_set_db["voltage_kv"],
643        voltage_tol_kv=beam_set_db["voltage_tol_kv"],
644        current_na=beam_set_db["current_na"],
645        current_tol_na=beam_set_db["current_tol_na"],
646        hfw_mm=beam_set_db["hfw_mm"],
647        working_dist_mm=beam_set_db["working_dist_mm"],
648        dynamic_focus=beam_set_db["dynamic_focus"],
649        tilt_correction=beam_set_db["tilt_correction"],
650    )
651
652    validate_auto_cb_settings(
653        settings=auto_cb_set_db,
654        yml_format=yml_format,
655        step_name=step_name,
656    )
657    auto_cb_settings = tbt.ScanArea(
658        left=auto_cb_set_db["left"],
659        top=auto_cb_set_db["top"],
660        width=auto_cb_set_db["width"],
661        height=auto_cb_set_db["height"],
662    )
663
664    validate_detector_settings(
665        microscope=microscope,
666        beam_type=beam_type,
667        settings=detector_set_db,
668        yml_format=yml_format,
669        step_name=step_name,
670    )
671    detector_settings = tbt.Detector(
672        type=tbt.DetectorType(detector_set_db["type"]),
673        mode=tbt.DetectorMode(detector_set_db["mode"]),
674        brightness=detector_set_db["brightness"],
675        contrast=detector_set_db["contrast"],
676        auto_cb_settings=auto_cb_settings,
677        # custom_settings=None,
678    )
679
680    validate_scan_settings(
681        microscope=microscope,
682        beam_type=beam_type,
683        settings=scan_set_db,
684        yml_format=yml_format,
685        step_name=step_name,
686    )
687
688    # cast resolution to preset if applicable
689    if ut.valid_enum_entry(obj=scan_res, check_type=tbt.PresetResolution):
690        scan_res = tbt.PresetResolution(scan_res)
691
692    scan_settings = tbt.Scan(
693        rotation_deg=scan_set_db["rotation_deg"],
694        dwell_time_us=scan_set_db["dwell_time_us"],
695        resolution=scan_res,
696        # mode=tbt.ScanMode(scan_set_db["mode"]),
697    )
698
699    # make sure Scan rotation is 0 if dynamic focus or tilt correction is on (using auto mode only for angular correction)
700    if beam_settings.dynamic_focus or beam_settings.tilt_correction:
701        if not math.isclose(a=scan_settings.rotation_deg, b=0.0):
702            raise ValueError(
703                f"Invalid .yml for step '{step_name}'. Scan rotation of '{scan_settings.rotation_deg}' degrees requested with tilt_correction and/or dynamic focus set to 'True'. Cannot use dynamic focus or tilt correction for non-zero scan rotation."
704            )
705
706    # validate bit_depth
707    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(bit_depth, tbt.ColorDepth):
708        valid_bit_depths = [i.value for i in tbt.ColorDepth]
709        raise ValueError(
710            f"Unsupported bit depth of {bit_depth}, available depths are {valid_bit_depths}"
711        )
712
713    image_settings = tbt.ImageSettings(
714        microscope=microscope,
715        beam=beam_object_type(beam_type)(settings=beam_settings),
716        detector=detector_settings,
717        scan=scan_settings,
718        bit_depth=bit_depth,
719    )
720
721    return image_settings

Converts image step from .yml file to microscope settings to capture an image. Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested.

Args: microscope: the connection to the microscope step_settings: image step dictioanry from a .yml file yml_format: format specified by version of the .yml file

Returns: image settings

def fib( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, step_settings: dict, step_name: str, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> pytribeam.types.EDSSettings: 
725def fib(
726    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
727    step_settings: dict,
728    step_name: str,
729    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
730) -> tbt.EDSSettings:
731    """Converts image step from .yml file to microscope settings
732    to capture an ebsd image. Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested.
733    """
734    ## create image_step_settings from this
735    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
736        image_step_settings = step_settings.get("image")
737        image_step_settings["step_general"] = step_settings.get("step_general")
738
739        mill_step_settings = step_settings.get("mill")
740        mill_beam_db = mill_step_settings.get("beam")
741        mill_pattern_db = mill_step_settings.get("pattern")
742
743    # ensure image is with an ion beam
744    enforce_beam_type(
745        tbt.IonBeam(settings=None),
746        step_settings=image_step_settings,
747        step_name=step_name,
748        yml_format=yml_format,
749    )
750    image_settings = image(
751        microscope=microscope,
752        step_settings=image_step_settings,
753        step_name=step_name,
754        yml_format=yml_format,
755    )
756
757    ## fib mill settings
758    # ensure milling is with an ion beam
759    enforce_beam_type(
760        tbt.IonBeam(settings=None),
761        step_settings=mill_step_settings,
762        step_name=step_name,
763        yml_format=yml_format,
764    )
765    beam_type = tbt.BeamType(mill_beam_db.get("type"))
766    # mill beam
767    validate_beam_settings(
768        microscope=microscope,
769        beam_type=beam_type,
770        settings=mill_beam_db,
771        yml_format=yml_format,
772        step_name=step_name,
773    )
774    mill_beam = tbt.IonBeam(
775        settings=tbt.BeamSettings(
776            voltage_kv=mill_beam_db["voltage_kv"],
777            voltage_tol_kv=mill_beam_db["voltage_tol_kv"],
778            current_na=mill_beam_db["current_na"],
779            current_tol_na=mill_beam_db["current_tol_na"],
780            hfw_mm=mill_beam_db["hfw_mm"],
781            working_dist_mm=mill_beam_db["working_dist_mm"],
782            dynamic_focus=mill_beam_db["dynamic_focus"],
783            tilt_correction=mill_beam_db["tilt_correction"],
784        )
785    )
786
787    # fib pattern settings
788    pattern = validate_fib_pattern_settings(
789        settings=mill_pattern_db,
790        yml_format=yml_format,
791        step_name=step_name,
792    )
793
794    fib_settings = tbt.FIBSettings(
795        microscope=microscope,
796        image=image_settings,
797        mill_beam=mill_beam,
798        pattern=pattern,
799    )
800    return fib_settings

Converts image step from .yml file to microscope settings to capture an ebsd image. Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested.

@singledispatch
def enforce_beam_type( beam_type, step_settings: dict, step_name: str, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> bool: 
803@singledispatch
804def enforce_beam_type(
805    beam_type,
806    step_settings: dict,
807    step_name: str,
808    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
809) -> bool:
810    """Enforce a specific beam type is used for an operation based on a dictionary. Dictionary must contain sub-dictionary with key 'beam'"""
811    _ = beam_type
812    __ = step_settings
813    ___ = step_name
814    ____ = yml_format
815    raise NotImplementedError(f"No handler for type {type(step_settings)}")

Enforce a specific beam type is used for an operation based on a dictionary. Dictionary must contain sub-dictionary with key 'beam'

def ebsd( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, step_settings: dict, step_name: str, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> pytribeam.types.EBSDSettings: 
864def ebsd(
865    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
866    step_settings: dict,
867    step_name: str,
868    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
869) -> tbt.EBSDSettings:
870    """Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested."""
871    enforce_beam_type(
872        tbt.ElectronBeam(settings=None),
873        step_settings=step_settings,
874        step_name=step_name,
875        yml_format=yml_format,
876    )
877    image_settings = image(
878        microscope=microscope,
879        step_settings=step_settings,
880        step_name=step_name,
881        yml_format=yml_format,
882    )
883    concurrent_EDS = step_settings.get("concurrent_EDS")
884    if (concurrent_EDS is None) or (not concurrent_EDS):
885        enable_eds = False
886    elif concurrent_EDS == True:
887        enable_eds = True
888    else:
889        raise KeyError(
890            f"Invalid .yml file, for step '{step_name}', an EBSD type step. 'concurrent_EDS' key is '{concurrent_EDS}' of type {type(concurrent_EDS)} but must be boolean (True/False) or of NoneType (null in .yml)."
891        )
892    ebsd_settings = tbt.EBSDSettings(
893        image=image_settings,
894        enable_eds=enable_eds,
895        enable_ebsd=True,
896    )
897    return ebsd_settings

Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested.

def eds( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, step_settings: dict, step_name: str, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> pytribeam.types.EDSSettings: 
900def eds(
901    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
902    step_settings: dict,
903    step_name: str,
904    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
905) -> tbt.EDSSettings:
906    """Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested."""
907    enforce_beam_type(
908        tbt.ElectronBeam(settings=None),
909        step_settings=step_settings,
910        step_name=step_name,
911        yml_format=yml_format,
912    )
913    image_settings = image(
914        microscope=microscope,
915        step_settings=step_settings,
916        step_name=step_name,
917        yml_format=yml_format,
918    )
919    eds_settings = tbt.EDSSettings(
920        image=image_settings,
921        enable_eds=True,
922    )
923    return eds_settings

Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested.

def custom( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, step_settings: dict, step_name: str, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> pytribeam.types.CustomSettings: 
953def custom(
954    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
955    step_settings: dict,
956    step_name: str,
957    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
958) -> tbt.CustomSettings:
959    """Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested."""
960    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
961        script_path = step_settings.get("script_path")
962        if script_path is None:
963            raise KeyError(
964                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'script_path' found in custom step_type for step '{step_name}'."
965            )
966        if not Path(script_path).is_file():
967            raise ValueError(
968                f"Invalid location for script at location {script_path}. File does not exist."
969            )
970
971        executable_path = step_settings.get("executable_path")
972        if executable_path is None:
973            raise KeyError(
974                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'executable_path' found in custom step_type for step '{step_name}'."
975            )
976        if not Path(executable_path).is_file():
977            raise ValueError(
978                f"Invalid location for executable at location {executable_path}. File does not exist."
979            )
980
981    custom_settings = tbt.CustomSettings(
982        script_path=Path(script_path),
983        executable_path=Path(executable_path),
984    )
985    return custom_settings

Performs schema checking to ensure valid inputs are requested.

def fib_pattern_type( settings: pytribeam.types.FIBSettings) -> Union[pytribeam.types.FIBBoxPattern, pytribeam.types.FIBStreamPattern]: 
988def fib_pattern_type(
989    settings: tbt.FIBSettings,
990) -> Union[tbt.FIBBoxPattern, tbt.FIBStreamPattern]:
991    """Returns specific pattern type settings for a properly formatted FIBSettings object"""

Returns specific pattern type settings for a properly formatted FIBSettings object

def scan_limits(selected_beam: property) -> pytribeam.types.ScanLimits: 
 994def scan_limits(
 995    selected_beam: property,
 996) -> tbt.ScanLimits:
 997    """Scan settings limits"""
 998    # rotation
 999    min_deg = selected_beam.scanning.rotation.limits.min * Conversions.RAD_TO_DEG
1000    max_deg = selected_beam.scanning.rotation.limits.max * Conversions.RAD_TO_DEG
1001    # dwell_time
1002    min_dwell_us = selected_beam.scanning.dwell_time.limits.min * Conversions.S_TO_US
1003    max_dwell_us = selected_beam.scanning.dwell_time.limits.max * Conversions.S_TO_US
1004
1005    return tbt.ScanLimits(
1006        rotation_deg=tbt.Limit(min=min_deg, max=max_deg),
1007        dwell_us=tbt.Limit(min=min_dwell_us, max=max_dwell_us),
1008    )

Scan settings limits

def string_to_res(input: str) -> pytribeam.types.Resolution: 
1011def string_to_res(input: str) -> tbt.Resolution:
1012    """Converts string in format of "{{width}}x{{height}}" to resolution object"""
1013    try:
1014        split_res = (input.lower()).split("x")
1015        width, height = int(split_res[0]), int(split_res[1])
1016    except:
1017        raise ValueError(
1018            f"""Invalid string format, 
1019                            expected string format of "WIDTHxHEIGHT", 
1020                            but received the following: "{input}"."""
1021        )
1022
1023    return tbt.Resolution(width=width, height=height)

Converts string in format of "{{width}}x{{height}}" to resolution object

def valid_string_resolution(string_resolution: str) -> bool: 
1026def valid_string_resolution(string_resolution: str) -> bool:
1027    """validates string resolution"""
1028    res = string_to_res(string_resolution)
1029    width, height = res.width, res.height
1030    return (
1031        ut.in_interval(
1032            width,
1033            limit=Constants.scan_resolution_limit,
1034            type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1035        )
1036    ) and (
1037        ut.in_interval(
1038            height,
1039            limit=Constants.scan_resolution_limit,
1040            type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1041        )
1042    )

validates string resolution

def validate_auto_cb_settings( settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str) -> bool: 
1045def validate_auto_cb_settings(
1046    settings: dict,
1047    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1048    step_name: str,
1049) -> bool:
1050    """Schema checking for auto contrast/brightness setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1051
1052    if ut.none_value_dictionary(settings):
1053        return True
1054
1055    if settings.get("left") is None or settings.get("top") is None:
1056        if settings.get("left") is None:
1057            missing_key = "left"
1058        else:
1059            missing_key = "top"
1060        raise KeyError(
1061            f"Missing or no value for '{missing_key}' key in 'auto_cb' sub-dictionary in step '{step_name}' All 'auto_cb' sub-dictionary values must be declared by the user to implement this capability."
1062        )
1063
1064    origin_limit = tbt.Limit(min=0.0, max=1.0)  # reduced area limit for scan window
1065    width_limit = tbt.Limit(min=0.0, max=1.0 - settings["left"])
1066    height_limit = tbt.Limit(min=0.0, max=1.0 - settings["top"])
1067
1068    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1069        schema = Schema(
1070            {
1071                "left": And(
1072                    float,
1073                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1074                        x,
1075                        limit=origin_limit,
1076                        type=tbt.IntervalType.RIGHT_OPEN,
1077                    ),
1078                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested auto contrast/brightness window setting 'left' of '{settings['left']}' must satisfy '0 <= left < {origin_limit.max}'. Origin is in top-left corner of the field of view.",
1079                ),
1080                "top": And(
1081                    float,
1082                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1083                        x,
1084                        limit=origin_limit,
1085                        type=tbt.IntervalType.RIGHT_OPEN,
1086                    ),
1087                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested auto contrast/brightness windows setting 'top' of '{settings['top']}' must satisfy '0.0 <= top < {origin_limit.max}'. Origin is in top-left corner of the field of view.",
1088                ),
1089                "width": And(
1090                    float,
1091                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1092                        x,
1093                        limit=width_limit,
1094                        type=tbt.IntervalType.LEFT_OPEN,
1095                    ),
1096                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested auto contrast/brightness windows setting 'width' of {settings['width']} must satisfy '0.0 < width <= {width_limit.max}' with 'left' setting of {settings['left']} as total width ('left' + 'width') cannot exceed 1.0",
1097                ),
1098                "height": And(
1099                    float,
1100                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1101                        x,
1102                        limit=height_limit,
1103                        type=tbt.IntervalType.LEFT_OPEN,
1104                    ),
1105                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested auto contrast/brightness windows setting 'height' of {settings['height']} must satisfy '0.0 < height <= {height_limit.max}' with 'top' setting of {settings['top']} as total height ('top' + 'height') cannot exceed 1.0",
1106                ),
1107            },
1108            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1109        )
1110
1111    try:
1112        schema.validate(settings)
1113    except UnboundLocalError:
1114        raise ValueError(
1115            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1116        )
1117    return True

Schema checking for auto contrast/brightness setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format

def validate_stage_position( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, step_name: str, settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> bool: 
1120def validate_stage_position(
1121    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
1122    step_name: str,
1123    settings: dict,
1124    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1125) -> bool:
1126    """Schema checking for stage position dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1127    limits = stage_limits(microscope=microscope)
1128
1129    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1130        schema = Schema(
1131            {
1132                "x_mm": And(
1133                    float,
1134                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1135                        x,
1136                        limit=limits.x_mm,
1137                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1138                    ),
1139                    error=f"Requested x-axis position of {settings['x_mm']} mm for step '{step_name}' must satisfy '{limits.x_mm.min} <= x_mm <= {limits.x_mm.max}'",
1140                ),
1141                "y_mm": And(
1142                    float,
1143                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1144                        x,
1145                        limit=limits.y_mm,
1146                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1147                    ),
1148                    error=f"Requested y-axis position of {settings['y_mm']} mm for step '{step_name}' must satisfy '{limits.y_mm.min} <= y_mm <= {limits.y_mm.max}'",
1149                ),
1150                "z_mm": And(
1151                    float,
1152                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1153                        x,
1154                        limit=limits.z_mm,
1155                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1156                    ),
1157                    error=f"Requested z-axis position of {settings['z_mm']} mm for step '{step_name}' must satisfy '{limits.z_mm.min} <= z_mm <= {limits.z_mm.max}'",
1158                ),
1159                "r_deg": And(
1160                    float,
1161                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1162                        x,
1163                        limit=limits.r_deg,
1164                        type=tbt.IntervalType.RIGHT_OPEN,
1165                    ),
1166                    error=f"Requested r-axis position of {settings['r_deg']} degree for step '{step_name}' must satisfy '{limits.r_deg.min} <= r_deg < {limits.r_deg.max}'",
1167                ),
1168                "t_deg": And(
1169                    float,
1170                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1171                        x,
1172                        limit=limits.t_deg,
1173                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1174                    ),
1175                    error=f"Requested r-axis position of {settings['t_deg']} degree for step '{step_name}' must satisfy '{limits.t_deg.min} <= t_deg <= {limits.t_deg.max}'",
1176                ),
1177            },
1178            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1179        )
1180
1181    try:
1182        schema.validate(settings)
1183    except UnboundLocalError:
1184        raise ValueError(
1185            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1186        )

Schema checking for stage position dictionary, format specified by yml_format

def validate_beam_settings( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, beam_type: pytribeam.types.BeamType, settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str) -> bool: 
1189def validate_beam_settings(
1190    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
1191    beam_type: tbt.BeamType,
1192    settings: dict,
1193    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1194    step_name: str,
1195) -> bool:
1196    """Schema checking for beam setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1197    specified_beam = beam_object_type(beam_type)(settings=tbt.BeamSettings())
1198    selected_beam = ut.beam_type(specified_beam, microscope)
1199
1200    limits = beam_limits(selected_beam, beam_type)
1201
1202    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1203        schema = Schema(
1204            {
1205                "voltage_kv": And(
1206                    float,
1207                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1208                        x,
1209                        limit=limits.voltage_kv,
1210                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1211                    ),
1212                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested voltage of '{settings['voltage_kv']}' kV not within limits of {limits.voltage_kv.min} kV and {limits.voltage_kv.max} kV.",
1213                ),
1214                "voltage_tol_kv": And(
1215                    float,
1216                    lambda x: x > 0,
1217                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested voltage tolerance of '{settings['voltage_tol_kv']}' kV must be a positive float (greater than 0).",
1218                ),
1219                "current_na": And(
1220                    float,
1221                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1222                        x,
1223                        limit=limits.current_na,
1224                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1225                    ),
1226                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested voltage of '{settings['current_na']}' nA not within limits of {limits.current_na.min} nA and {limits.current_na.max} nA",
1227                ),
1228                "current_tol_na": And(
1229                    float,
1230                    lambda x: x > 0,
1231                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', 'current_tol_na' must be a positive float (greater than 0)",
1232                ),
1233                "hfw_mm": And(
1234                    float,
1235                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1236                        x,
1237                        limits.hfw_mm,
1238                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1239                    ),
1240                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested horizontal field width of '{settings['hfw_mm']}' mm not within limits of {limits.hfw_mm.min} mm and {limits.hfw_mm.max} mm",
1241                ),
1242                "working_dist_mm": And(
1243                    float,
1244                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1245                        x,
1246                        limit=limits.working_distance_mm,
1247                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1248                    ),
1249                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested working distance of '{settings['working_dist_mm']}' mm not within limits of {limits.working_distance_mm.min} mm and {limits.working_distance_mm.max} mm",
1250                ),
1251            },
1252            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1253        )
1254
1255        e_beam_schema = Schema(
1256            {
1257                "dynamic_focus": Or(
1258                    None,
1259                    bool,
1260                    error=f"In step '{step_name}' with 'electron' beam imaging, 'dynamic_focus' must be a boolean value but '{settings['dynamic_focus']}' of type {type(settings['dynamic_focus'])} was requested.",
1261                ),
1262                "tilt_correction": Or(
1263                    None,
1264                    bool,
1265                    error=f"In step '{step_name}' with 'electron' beam imaging, 'tilt_correction' must be a boolean value but '{settings['tilt_correction']}' of type {type(settings['tilt_correction'])} was requested.",
1266                ),
1267            },
1268            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1269        )
1270        i_beam_schema = Schema(
1271            {
1272                "dynamic_focus": Or(
1273                    None,
1274                    False,
1275                    error=f"In step '{step_name}' with 'ion' beam imaging, 'dynamic_focus' must be 'False' or 'None' but '{settings['dynamic_focus']}' of type {type(settings['dynamic_focus'])} was requested.",
1276                ),
1277                "tilt_correction": Or(
1278                    None,
1279                    False,
1280                    error=f"In step '{step_name}' with 'ion' beam imaging, 'tilt_correction' must be 'False' or 'None' but '{settings['tilt_correction']}' of type {type(settings['tilt_correction'])} was requested.",
1281                ),
1282            },
1283            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1284        )
1285
1286    try:
1287        schema.validate(settings)
1288        if specified_beam.type == tbt.BeamType.ELECTRON:
1289            e_beam_schema.validate(settings)
1290        if specified_beam.type == tbt.BeamType.ION:
1291            i_beam_schema.validate(settings)
1292    except UnboundLocalError:
1293        raise ValueError(
1294            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1295        )

Schema checking for beam setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format

def validate_detector_settings( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, beam_type: pytribeam.types.BeamType, settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str) -> bool: 
1298def validate_detector_settings(
1299    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
1300    beam_type: tbt.BeamType,
1301    settings: dict,
1302    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1303    step_name: str,
1304) -> bool:
1305    """Schema checking for detector setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1306
1307    # switch to top left quad, enable e-beam
1308    devices.device_access(microscope=microscope)
1309
1310    # set specified beam to active imaging device
1311    specified_beam = beam_object_type(beam_type)(settings=tbt.BeamSettings())
1312    img.set_beam_device(
1313        microscope=microscope,
1314        device=specified_beam.device,
1315    )
1316
1317    auto_cb_db = settings.get("auto_cb")
1318    use_auto_cb = not ut.none_value_dictionary(settings.get("auto_cb"))
1319    if use_auto_cb and (
1320        settings.get("brightness") is not None or settings.get("contrast") is not None
1321    ):
1322        raise KeyError(
1323            f"Auto contrast/brightness settings of {auto_cb_db} provided while settings of fixed brightness of '{settings.get('brightness')}' and fixed contrast of '{settings.get('contrast')}' were also provided. Users may use either fixed brightness/contrast values or auto contrast/brightness settings, but not both."
1324        )
1325
1326    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1327        detector = settings.get("type")
1328        mode = settings.get("mode")
1329        cb_limit = tbt.Limit(min=0.0, max=1.0)
1330        schema = Schema(
1331            {
1332                "brightness": Or(
1333                    None,
1334                    And(
1335                        float,
1336                        lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1337                            x,
1338                            limit=cb_limit,
1339                            type=tbt.IntervalType.LEFT_OPEN,
1340                        ),
1341                    ),
1342                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested fixed brightness of '{settings['brightness']}'. This is not within limits of '>{cb_limit.min}' and '<={cb_limit.max}'.",
1343                ),
1344                "contrast": Or(
1345                    None,
1346                    And(
1347                        float,
1348                        lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1349                            x,
1350                            limit=cb_limit,
1351                            type=tbt.IntervalType.LEFT_OPEN,
1352                        ),
1353                    ),
