1354                    error=f"In step '{step_name}', requested fixed contrast of '{settings['contrast']}'. This is either not within limits of '>{cb_limit.min}' and '<={cb_limit.max}'.",
1355                ),
1356            },
1357            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1358        )
1359
1360    # check detector type
1361    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(detector, tbt.DetectorType):
1362        raise ValueError(
1363            f"Unsupported detector type of '{detector}' on step '{step_name}'."
1364        )
1365    detector_type = tbt.DetectorType(detector)
1366    microscope_detector_types = available_detector_types(microscope=microscope)
1367    if detector_type.value not in microscope_detector_types:
1368        raise ValueError(
1369            f"Requested detector of {detector_type.value} is unavailable on this tool. Available detectors are: {microscope_detector_types}"
1370        )
1371    # make sure to set this detector as the active one to access modes
1372    img.detector_type(
1373        microscope=microscope,
1374        detector=detector_type,
1375    )
1376
1377    # check detector mode
1378    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(mode, tbt.DetectorMode):
1379        raise ValueError(
1380            f'Unsupported detector mode of "{mode}" for "{detector}" detector'
1381        )
1382    detector_mode = tbt.DetectorMode(mode)
1383    microscope_detector_modes = available_detector_modes(microscope=microscope)
1384    if detector_mode.value not in microscope_detector_modes:
1385        raise ValueError(
1386            f"Requested mode of {detector_mode.value} for {detector_type.value} detector is invalid. Valid mode types are: {microscope_detector_modes}"
1387        )
1388
1389    # check detector settings
1390    try:
1391        schema.validate(settings)
1392    except UnboundLocalError:
1393        raise ValueError(
1394            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1395        )

Schema checking for detector setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format

def validate_EBSD_EDS_settings( connection_host: str, connection_port: str, ebsd_oem: str, eds_oem: str) -> bool: 
1398def validate_EBSD_EDS_settings(
1399    connection_host: str,
1400    connection_port: str,
1401    ebsd_oem: str,
1402    eds_oem: str,
1403) -> bool:
1404    """Checks EBSD and EDS OEM and connection for supported OEMs"""
1405    # ensure same manufacturer for both EBSD and EDS
1406    if (ebsd_oem is not None) and (eds_oem is not None) and (ebsd_oem != eds_oem):
1407        raise NotImplementedError(
1408            f"Differing EBSD and EDS OEMs are not supported. Requested EBSD OEM of '{ebsd_oem}' and EDS OEM of '{eds_oem}'."
1409        )
1410
1411    # Check EBSD OEM
1412    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(ebsd_oem, tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM):
1413        raise ValueError(
1414            f"Unsupported EBSD OEM of '{ebsd_oem}'. Supported OEM types are: {[i.value for i in tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM]}"
1415        )
1416    ebsd_device = tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(ebsd_oem)
1417    # Check EDS OEM
1418    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(eds_oem, tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM):
1419        raise ValueError(
1420            f"Unsupported EDS OEM of '{eds_oem}'. Supported OEM types are: {[i.value for i in tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM]}"
1421        )
1422    eds_device = tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(eds_oem)
1423
1424    # exit if both devices are none, no need for laser control
1425    if ebsd_device == eds_device == tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM.NONE:
1426        return True
1427
1428    # check EBSD and EDS connection
1429    try:
1430        external
1431    except:
1432        raise SystemError(
1433            "EBSD and/or EDS control requested, but Laser API not accessible, so cannot use EBSD and EDS control. Please restart Laser API, or if not installed, change OEM to 'null', or leave blank in settings file."
1434        )
1435    microscope = tbt.Microscope()
1436    ut.connect_microscope(
1437        microscope=microscope,
1438        quiet_output=True,
1439        connection_host=connection_host,
1440        connection_port=connection_port,
1441    )
1442    if tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(eds_oem) != tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM.NONE:
1443        devices.retract_EDS(microscope=microscope)
1444    if tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM(ebsd_oem) != tbt.ExternalDeviceOEM.NONE:
1445        devices.retract_EBSD(microscope=microscope)
1446    ut.disconnect_microscope(
1447        microscope=microscope,
1448        quiet_output=True,
1449    )
1450    return True

Checks EBSD and EDS OEM and connection for supported OEMs

def validate_general_settings(settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> bool: 
1453def validate_general_settings(
1454    settings: dict,
1455    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1456) -> bool:
1457    """Schema checking for general setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format.
1458    Checks microscope connection
1459    Checks EBSD/EDS connection if valid OEM specified
1460    """
1461
1462    if settings == {}:
1463        raise ValueError("General settings dictionary is empty.")
1464
1465    slice_thickness_limit_um = Constants.slice_thickness_limit_um
1466    pre_tilt_limit_deg = Constants.pre_tilt_limit_deg_generic
1467
1468    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1469        sectioning_axis = settings["sectioning_axis"]
1470        connection_host = settings["connection_host"]
1471        connection_port = settings["connection_port"]
1472        ebsd_oem = settings["EBSD_OEM"]
1473        eds_oem = settings["EDS_OEM"]
1474        exp_dir = settings["exp_dir"]
1475        h5_log_name = settings["h5_log_name"]
1476
1477    # Validate the non-numeric values
1478    # Check sectioning axis
1479    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(sectioning_axis, tbt.SectioningAxis):
1480        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported sectioning axis of {sectioning_axis}.")
1481    # TODO
1482    if tbt.SectioningAxis(sectioning_axis) != tbt.SectioningAxis.Z:
1483        raise NotImplementedError("Currently only Z-axis sectioning is supported.")
1484    if tbt.SectioningAxis(sectioning_axis) != tbt.SectioningAxis.Z:
1485        pre_tilt_limit_deg = Constants.pre_tilt_limit_deg_non_Z_sectioning  # overwrite
1486        warnings.warn(
1487            "Pre-tilt value must be zero (0.0) degrees when using a sectioning axis other than 'Z'"
1488        )
1489    # Check connection host and port
1490    if not ut.valid_microscope_connection(
1491        host=connection_host,
1492        port=connection_port,
1493    ):
1494        raise ValueError(
1495            f"Unsupported connection with host of {connection_host} and port of {connection_port}."
1496        )
1497
1498    # check EBSD and EDS
1499    validate_EBSD_EDS_settings(
1500        connection_host=connection_host,
1501        connection_port=connection_port,
1502        ebsd_oem=ebsd_oem,
1503        eds_oem=eds_oem,
1504    )
1505
1506    # Check exp dir
1507    try:
1508        Path(exp_dir).mkdir(
1509            parents=True,
1510            exist_ok=True,
1511        )
1512    except TypeError:
1513        raise ValueError(
1514            f'Requested experimental directory of "{exp_dir}", which is not a valid path.'
1515        )
1516    # Check h5 log name
1517    if not isinstance(h5_log_name, str):
1518        raise ValueError(f'Unsupported h5 log name of "{h5_log_name}"')
1519
1520    schema = Schema(
1521        {
1522            "slice_thickness_um": And(
1523                float,
1524                lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1525                    x,
1526                    limit=slice_thickness_limit_um,
1527                    type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1528                ),
1529                error=f"Requested slice thickness of {settings['slice_thickness_um']} um must satisfy '{slice_thickness_limit_um.min} <= slice_thickness_um <= {slice_thickness_limit_um.max}'",
1530            ),
1531            "max_slice_num": And(
1532                int,
1533                lambda x: x > 0,
1534                error=f"Requested max slice number of {settings['max_slice_num']} must satisfy '0 < max_slice_number'",
1535            ),
1536            "pre_tilt_deg": And(
1537                float,
1538                lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1539                    x,
1540                    limit=pre_tilt_limit_deg,
1541                    type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1542                ),
1543                error=f"Requested pre tilt of {settings['pre_tilt_deg']} degrees must satisfy '{pre_tilt_limit_deg.min} <= pre_tilt_deg <= {pre_tilt_limit_deg.max}'",
1544            ),
1545            "stage_translational_tol_um": And(
1546                float,
1547                lambda x: x > 0,
1548                error=f"Requested stage translational tolerance of {settings['stage_translational_tol_um']} um must be a positive float (greater than 0)",
1549            ),
1550            "stage_angular_tol_deg": And(
1551                float,
1552                lambda x: x > 0,
1553                error=f"Requested stage angular tolerance of {settings['stage_angular_tol_deg']} degrees must be a positive float (greater than 0)",
1554            ),
1555            "step_count": And(
1556                int,
1557                lambda x: x > 0,
1558                error=f"Requested step count of {settings['step_count']} must be a positive int (greater than 0)",
1559            ),
1560        },
1561        ignore_extra_keys=True,
1562    )
1563
1564    try:
1565        schema.validate(settings)
1566    except UnboundLocalError:
1567        raise ValueError(
1568            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1569        )

Schema checking for general setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format. Checks microscope connection Checks EBSD/EDS connection if valid OEM specified

def validate_scan_settings( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, beam_type: pytribeam.types.BeamType, settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str) -> bool: 
1572def validate_scan_settings(
1573    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
1574    beam_type: tbt.BeamType,
1575    settings: dict,
1576    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1577    step_name: str,
1578) -> bool:
1579    """Schema checking for beam setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1580    specified_beam = beam_object_type(beam_type)(settings=tbt.BeamSettings())
1581    selected_beam = ut.beam_type(specified_beam, microscope)
1582
1583    """Schema checking for scan setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1584    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1585        limits = scan_limits(selected_beam)
1586        resolution = settings["resolution"]
1587        rotation_limit = limits.rotation_deg
1588        dwell_limit = limits.dwell_us
1589
1590    # check resolution
1591    res = string_to_res(resolution)
1592
1593    schema = Schema(
1594        {
1595            "resolution": And(
1596                str,
1597                lambda x: valid_string_resolution(x),
1598                error=f"In '{step_name}', resolution provided was {settings['resolution']}, but must be an integer width and height in format '[width]x[height]'  with each dimension satisfying '{Constants.scan_resolution_limit.min} <= [value] <=  {Constants.scan_resolution_limit.max}",
1599            ),
1600            "rotation_deg": And(
1601                float,
1602                lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1603                    x,
1604                    limit=rotation_limit,
1605                    type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1606                ),
1607                error=f"In '{step_name}', requested fixed rotation of '{settings['rotation_deg']}' degrees. This is not a float or not within limits of '>={rotation_limit.min}' and '<={rotation_limit.max}' degrees. Setting is of type {type(settings['rotation_deg'])}.",
1608            ),
1609            "dwell_time_us": And(
1610                float,
1611                lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1612                    x,
1613                    limit=dwell_limit,
1614                    type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1615                ),
1616                error=f"In '{step_name}', requested fixed dwell_time of '{settings['dwell_time_us']}' microseconds. This is a float or not within limits of '>={dwell_limit.min}' and '<={dwell_limit.max}' microseconds. Settting is of type {type(settings['dwell_time_us'])}.",
1617            ),
1618        },
1619        ignore_extra_keys=True,
1620    )
1621
1622    try:
1623        schema.validate(settings)
1624    except UnboundLocalError:
1625        raise ValueError(
1626            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1627        )

Schema checking for beam setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format

def stage_position_settings( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, step_name: str, general_settings: pytribeam.types.GeneralSettings, step_stage_settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> pytribeam.types.StageSettings: 
1630def stage_position_settings(
1631    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
1632    step_name: str,
1633    general_settings: tbt.GeneralSettings,
1634    step_stage_settings: dict,
1635    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1636) -> tbt.StageSettings:
1637    """Create StagePositionUser object from settings, including validation"""
1638
1639    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1640        pos_db = step_stage_settings.get("initial_position")
1641
1642        rotation_side = step_stage_settings["rotation_side"]
1643        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(rotation_side, tbt.RotationSide):
1644            raise NotImplementedError(
1645                f"Unsupported rotation_side value of '{rotation_side}' of type '{type(rotation_side)}' in step '{step_name}', supported rotation_side values are: {[i.value for i in tbt.RotationSide]}."
1646            )
1647
1648    validate_stage_position(
1649        microscope=microscope,
1650        step_name=step_name,
1651        settings=pos_db,
1652        yml_format=yml_format,
1653    )
1654
1655    initial_position = tbt.StagePositionUser(
1656        x_mm=pos_db["x_mm"],
1657        y_mm=pos_db["y_mm"],
1658        z_mm=pos_db["z_mm"],
1659        r_deg=pos_db["r_deg"],
1660        t_deg=pos_db["t_deg"],
1661    )
1662
1663    pretilt_angle_deg = general_settings.pre_tilt_deg
1664    sectioning_axis = general_settings.sectioning_axis
1665
1666    stage_settings = tbt.StageSettings(
1667        microscope=microscope,
1668        initial_position=initial_position,
1669        pretilt_angle_deg=pretilt_angle_deg,
1670        sectioning_axis=sectioning_axis,
1671        rotation_side=tbt.RotationSide(rotation_side),
1672        # movement_mode=tbt.StageMovementMode.OUT_OF_PLANE,
1673    )
1674
1675    return stage_settings

Create StagePositionUser object from settings, including validation

def validate_pulse_settings( settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str) -> bool: 
1678def validate_pulse_settings(
1679    settings: dict,
1680    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1681    step_name: str,
1682) -> bool:
1683    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1684        wavelength_nm = settings.get("wavelength_nm")
1685        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(wavelength_nm, tbt.LaserWavelength):
1686            raise NotImplementedError(
1687                f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported wavelength of '{wavelength_nm}' nm (data type {type(wavelength_nm)}), supported wavelengths are: {[i.value for i in tbt.LaserWavelength]}."
1688            )
1689        polarization = settings.get("polarization")
1690        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(polarization, tbt.LaserPolarization):
1691            raise NotImplementedError(
1692                f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported laser polarization of '{polarization}', supported values are: {[i.value for i in tbt.LaserPolarization]}."
1693            )
1694
1695        schema = Schema(
1696            {
1697                "divider": And(
1698                    int,
1699                    lambda x: x > 0,
1700                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'divider' parameter must be a positive integer greater than 0 but '{settings['divider']}' was requested.",
1701                ),
1702                "energy_uj": And(
1703                    float,
1704                    lambda x: x > 0,
1705                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'energy_uj' parameter must be a positive float greater than 0 but '{settings['energy_uj']}' was requested.",
1706                ),
1707            },
1708            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1709        )
1710    try:
1711        schema.validate(settings)
1712    except UnboundLocalError:
1713        raise ValueError(
1714            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1715        )
def validate_laser_optics_settings( settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str) -> bool: 
1718def validate_laser_optics_settings(
1719    settings: dict,
1720    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1721    step_name: str,
1722) -> bool:
1723    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1724        schema = Schema(
1725            {
1726                "objective_position_mm": And(
1727                    float,
1728                    lambda x: ut.in_interval(
1729                        x,
1730                        limit=Constants.laser_objective_limit_mm,
1731                        type=tbt.IntervalType.CLOSED,
1732                    ),
1733                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'objective_position_mm' parameter must be a float satisfying the following: {Constants.laser_objective_limit_mm.min} mm <= value <= {Constants.laser_objective_limit_mm.max} mm. '{settings['objective_position_mm']}' mm (of type {type(settings['objective_position_mm'])}) was requested.",
1734                ),
1735                "beam_shift_um_x": And(
1736                    float,
1737                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'x' parameter for 'beam_shift_um' sub-dictioanry must be a float but '{settings['beam_shift_um_x']}' (of type {type(settings['beam_shift_um_x'])}) was requested.",
1738                ),
1739                "beam_shift_um_y": And(
1740                    float,
1741                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'y' parameter for 'beam_shift_um' sub-dictioanry must be a float but '{settings['beam_shift_um_y']}' (of type {type(settings['beam_shift_um_y'])}) was requested.",
1742                ),
1743            },
1744            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1745        )
1746    try:
1747        schema.validate(settings)
1748    except UnboundLocalError:
1749        raise ValueError(
1750            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1751        )
def validate_laser_box_settings( settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str) -> bool: 
1754def validate_laser_box_settings(
1755    settings: dict,
1756    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1757    step_name: str,
1758) -> bool:
1759    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1760        # scan type
1761        scan_type = settings.get("scan_type")
1762        scan_types = [
1763            tbt.LaserScanType.RASTER,
1764            tbt.LaserScanType.SERPENTINE,
1765        ]
1766        scan_type_error_msg = f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported scan type of '{scan_type}' for box pattern, supported scan types are: {[i.value for i in scan_types]}."
1767        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(scan_type, tbt.LaserScanType):
1768            raise NotImplementedError(scan_type_error_msg)
1769        if tbt.LaserScanType(scan_type) not in scan_types:
1770            raise NotImplementedError(scan_type_error_msg)
1771
1772        # coordinate reference
1773        coordinate_ref = settings.get("coordinate_ref")
1774        coord_refs = [
1775            tbt.CoordinateReference.CENTER,
1776            tbt.CoordinateReference.UPPER_CENTER,
1777            tbt.CoordinateReference.UPPER_LEFT,
1778        ]
1779        coord_error_msg = f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported coordinate reference of '{coordinate_ref}' for box pattern, supported coordinate references are: {[i.value for i in coord_refs]}."
1780        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(coordinate_ref, tbt.CoordinateReference):
1781            raise NotImplementedError(coord_error_msg)
1782        if tbt.CoordinateReference(coordinate_ref) not in coord_refs:
1783            raise NotImplementedError(coord_error_msg)
1784
1785        schema = Schema(
1786            {
1787                "passes": And(
1788                    int,
1789                    lambda x: x > 0,
1790                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'passes' parameter in 'box' type pattern must be a positive integer. '{settings['passes']}' (of type {type(settings['passes'])}) was requested.",
1791                ),
1792                "size_x_um": And(
1793                    float,
1794                    lambda x: x > 0,
1795                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'size_x_um' parameter in 'box' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['size_x_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['size_x_um'])}) was requested.",
1796                ),
1797                "size_y_um": And(
1798                    float,
1799                    lambda x: x > 0,
1800                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'size_y_um' parameter in 'box' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['size_y_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['size_y_um'])}) was requested.",
1801                ),
1802                "pitch_x_um": And(
1803                    float,
1804                    lambda x: x > 0,
1805                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'pitch_x_um' parameter in 'box' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['pitch_x_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['pitch_x_um'])}) was requested.",
1806                ),
1807                "pitch_y_um": And(
1808                    float,
1809                    lambda x: x > 0,
1810                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'pitch_y_um' parameter in 'box' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['pitch_y_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['pitch_y_um'])}) was requested.",
1811                ),
1812            },
1813            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1814        )
1815    try:
1816        schema.validate(settings)
1817    except UnboundLocalError:
1818        raise ValueError(
1819            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1820        )
def validate_laser_line_settings( settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str) -> bool: 
1823def validate_laser_line_settings(
1824    settings: dict,
1825    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1826    step_name: str,
1827) -> bool:
1828    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1829        # scan type
1830        scan_type = settings.get("scan_type")
1831        scan_types = [
1832            tbt.LaserScanType.SINGLE,
1833            tbt.LaserScanType.LAP,
1834        ]
1835        scan_type_error_msg = f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported scan type of '{scan_type}' for line pattern, supported scan types are: {[i.value for i in scan_types]}."
1836        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(scan_type, tbt.LaserScanType):
1837            raise NotImplementedError(scan_type_error_msg)
1838        if tbt.LaserScanType(scan_type) not in scan_types:
1839            raise NotImplementedError(scan_type_error_msg)
1840
1841        schema = Schema(
1842            {
1843                "passes": And(
1844                    int,
1845                    lambda x: x > 0,
1846                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'passes' parameter in 'line' type pattern must be a positive integer. '{settings['passes']}' (of type {type(settings['passes'])}) was requested.",
1847                ),
1848                "size_um": And(
1849                    float,
1850                    lambda x: x > 0,
1851                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'size_um' parameter in 'line' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['size_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['size_um'])}) was requested.",
1852                ),
1853                "pitch_um": And(
1854                    float,
1855                    lambda x: x > 0,
1856                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'pitch_um' parameter in 'line' type pattern must be a positive float. '{settings['pitch_um']}' mm (of type {type(settings['pitch_um'])}) was requested.",
1857                ),
1858            },
1859            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1860        )
1861    try:
1862        schema.validate(settings)
1863    except UnboundLocalError:
1864        raise ValueError(
1865            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1866        )
def validate_laser_mode_settings( settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str) -> bool: 
1869def validate_laser_mode_settings(
1870    settings: dict,
1871    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1872    step_name: str,
1873) -> bool:
1874    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1875        mode = settings.get("mode")
1876        if not ut.valid_enum_entry(mode, tbt.LaserPatternMode):
1877            raise NotImplementedError(
1878                f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', unsupported laser pattern mode of '{mode}', supported values are: {[i.value for i in tbt.LaserPatternMode]}."
1879            )
1880
1881        schema = Schema(
1882            {
1883                "rotation_deg": And(
1884                    float,
1885                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'rotation_deg' parameter must be a float. '{settings['rotation_deg']}' degrees (of type {type(settings['rotation_deg'])}) was requested.",
1886                ),
1887            },
1888            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1889        )
1890        schema_fine = Schema(
1891            {
1892                "pulses_per_pixel": And(
1893                    int,
1894                    lambda x: x > 0,
1895                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'pulses_per_pixel' parameter is required for pattern type of 'fine'. 'pulses_per_pixel' must be a positive integer greater than 0. '{settings['pulses_per_pixel']}' (of type {type(settings['pulses_per_pixel'])}) was requested.",
1896                ),
1897            },
1898            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1899        )
1900        schema_coarse = Schema(
1901            {
1902                "pixel_dwell_ms": And(
1903                    float,
1904                    lambda x: x > 0.0,
1905                    error=f"In 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}', 'pixel_dwell_ms' parameter is required for pattern type of 'coarse'. 'pixel_dwell_ms' must be a positive float greater than 0. '{settings['pixel_dwell_ms']}' (of type {type(settings['pixel_dwell_ms'])}) was requested.",
1906                ),
1907            },
1908            ignore_extra_keys=True,
1909        )
1910    try:
1911        schema.validate(settings)
1912        if mode == "fine":
1913            schema_fine.validate(settings)
1914        if mode == "coarse":
1915            schema_coarse.validate(settings)
1916    except UnboundLocalError:
1917        raise ValueError(
1918            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
1919        )
def validate_laser_pattern_settings( settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str) -> pytribeam.types.LaserPatternType: 
1922def validate_laser_pattern_settings(
1923    settings: dict,
1924    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1925    step_name: str,
1926) -> tbt.LaserPatternType:
1927    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1928        # determine type of pattern (only one allowed)
1929        type_set_db = settings.get("type")
1930        if type_set_db is None:
1931            raise KeyError(
1932                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'type' settings sub-dictionary found in 'pattern' settings in 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
1933            )
1934
1935        box_settings = type_set_db.get("box")
1936        line_settings = type_set_db.get("line")
1937        if box_settings is None:
1938            box_pattern = False
1939        else:
1940            box_pattern = not ut.none_value_dictionary(box_settings)
1941        if line_settings is None:
1942            line_pattern = False
1943        else:
1944            line_pattern = not ut.none_value_dictionary(line_settings)
1945        if box_pattern == line_pattern == False:
1946            raise KeyError(
1947                f"Invalid .yml file in 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}'. No pattern type settings found."
1948            )
1949        if box_pattern == line_pattern == True:
1950            raise KeyError(
1951                f"Invalid .yml file in 'laser' step_type for step '{step_name}'. Pattern settings for one and only one type are allowed. Type settings found for both 'box' and 'line' type. Please leave one set of type settings completely blank, enter 'null' for each parameter, or remove the unused subdictionary completely from the .yml file."
1952            )
1953        validate_laser_mode_settings(
1954            settings=settings,
1955            yml_format=yml_format,
1956            step_name=step_name,
1957        )
1958
1959        if box_pattern:
1960            validate_laser_box_settings(
1961                settings=box_settings,
1962                yml_format=yml_format,
1963                step_name=step_name,
1964            )
1965            return tbt.LaserPatternType.BOX
1966        elif line_pattern:
1967            validate_laser_line_settings(
1968                settings=line_settings,
1969                yml_format=yml_format,
1970                step_name=step_name,
1971            )
1972            return tbt.LaserPatternType.LINE
1973        else:
1974            raise ValueError(
1975                f"Invalid laser pattern settings for step {step_name}. Supported types are {[i.value for i in tbt.LaserPatternType]}"
1976            )
def validate_fib_pattern_settings( settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str) -> Union[pytribeam.types.FIBRectanglePattern, pytribeam.types.FIBRegularCrossSection, pytribeam.types.FIBCleaningCrossSection, pytribeam.types.FIBStreamPattern]: 
1979def validate_fib_pattern_settings(
1980    settings: dict,
1981    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
1982    step_name: str,
1983) -> Union[
1984    tbt.FIBRectanglePattern,
1985    tbt.FIBRegularCrossSection,
1986    tbt.FIBCleaningCrossSection,
1987    tbt.FIBStreamPattern,
1988]:
1989    """Schema checking for fib pattern setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format"""
1990
1991    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
1992        application_file = settings.get("application_file")
1993        # determine type of pattern (only one allowed)
1994        type_set_db = settings.get("type")
1995        if type_set_db is None:
1996            raise KeyError(
1997                f"Invalid .yml file, no 'type' settings sub-dictionary found in 'pattern' settings in 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}'."
1998            )
1999        rectangle_settings = type_set_db.get("rectangle")
2000        regular_cross_section_settings = type_set_db.get("regular_cross_section")
2001        cleaning_cross_section_settings = type_set_db.get("cleaning_cross_section")
2002        selected_area_settings = type_set_db.get("selected_area")
2003
2004        pattern_settings = [
2005            rectangle_settings,
2006            regular_cross_section_settings,
2007            cleaning_cross_section_settings,
2008            selected_area_settings,
2009        ]
2010        (
2011            rectangle_pattern,
2012            regular_cross_section_pattern,
2013            cleaning_cross_section_pattern,
2014            selected_area_pattern,
2015        ) = (None, None, None, None)
2016        # pattern_names = [val.value for val in tbt.FIBPatternType]  # remembers order
2017        # assert pattern_names == [
2018        #     "rectangle",
2019        #     "regular_cross_section",
2020        #     "cleaning_cross_section",
2021        #     "selected_area",
2022        # ]
2023        pattern_names = [
2024            "rectangle",
2025            "regular_cross_section",
2026            "cleaning_cross_section",
2027            "selected_area",
2028        ]
2029        pattern_types = [
2030            rectangle_pattern,
2031            regular_cross_section_pattern,
2032            cleaning_cross_section_pattern,
2033            selected_area_pattern,
2034        ]
2035
2036        for type in range(len(pattern_settings)):
2037            db = pattern_settings[type]
2038            if db is None:
2039                pattern_types[type] = False
2040            else:
2041                pattern_types[type] = not ut.none_value_dictionary(db)
2042
2043        # one and only one type of pattern can have settings
2044        if sum(pattern_types) != 1:
2045            raise KeyError(
2046                f"Invalid .yml file in 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}'. Pattern settings for one and only one type are allowed. Please provide settings for only one of the supported pattern types: {[name for name in pattern_names]}. For unused pattern types, leave the type settings completely blank, enter 'null' for each parameter, or remove the unused subdictionary completely from the .yml file."
2047            )
2048        pattern_type = tbt.FIBPatternType(pattern_names[pattern_types.index(True)])
2049
2050    # check application file
2051    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(application_file, tbt.FIBApplication):
2052        raise ValueError(
2053            f"Unsupported FIB application file type of '{application_file}' on step '{step_name}'"
2054        )
2055
2056    if pattern_type == tbt.FIBPatternType.RECTANGLE:
2057        validate_fib_box_settings(
2058            settings=rectangle_settings,
2059            yml_format=yml_format,
2060            step_name=step_name,
2061            pattern_type=pattern_type,
2062        )
2063
2064        pattern = tbt.FIBPattern(
2065            application=tbt.FIBApplication(application_file),
2066            type=pattern_type,
2067            geometry=tbt.FIBRectanglePattern(
2068                center_um=tbt.Point(
2069                    x=rectangle_settings.get("center").get("x_um"),
2070                    y=rectangle_settings.get("center").get("y_um"),
2071                ),
2072                width_um=rectangle_settings.get("width_um"),
2073                height_um=rectangle_settings.get("height_um"),
2074                depth_um=rectangle_settings.get("depth_um"),
2075                scan_direction=tbt.FIBPatternScanDirection(
2076                    rectangle_settings.get("scan_direction")
2077                ),
2078                scan_type=tbt.FIBPatternScanType(rectangle_settings.get("scan_type")),
2079            ),
2080        )
2081        return pattern
2082    elif pattern_type == tbt.FIBPatternType.REGULAR_CROSS_SECTION:
2083        validate_fib_box_settings(
2084            settings=regular_cross_section_settings,
2085            yml_format=yml_format,
2086            step_name=step_name,
2087            pattern_type=pattern_type,
2088        )
2089        pattern = tbt.FIBPattern(
2090            application=tbt.FIBApplication(application_file),
2091            type=pattern_type,
2092            geometry=tbt.FIBRegularCrossSection(
2093                center_um=tbt.Point(
2094                    x=regular_cross_section_settings.get("center").get("x_um"),
2095                    y=regular_cross_section_settings.get("center").get("y_um"),
2096                ),
2097                width_um=regular_cross_section_settings.get("width_um"),
2098                height_um=regular_cross_section_settings.get("height_um"),
2099                depth_um=regular_cross_section_settings.get("depth_um"),
2100                scan_direction=tbt.FIBPatternScanDirection(
2101                    regular_cross_section_settings.get("scan_direction")
2102                ),
2103                scan_type=tbt.FIBPatternScanType(
2104                    regular_cross_section_settings.get("scan_type")
2105                ),
2106            ),
2107        )
2108        return pattern
2109    elif pattern_type == tbt.FIBPatternType.CLEANING_CROSS_SECTION:
2110        validate_fib_box_settings(
2111            settings=cleaning_cross_section_settings,
2112            yml_format=yml_format,
2113            step_name=step_name,
2114            pattern_type=pattern_type,
2115        )
2116        pattern = tbt.FIBPattern(
2117            application=tbt.FIBApplication(application_file),
2118            type=pattern_type,
2119            geometry=tbt.FIBCleaningCrossSection(
2120                center_um=tbt.Point(
2121                    x=cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("center").get("x_um"),
2122                    y=cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("center").get("y_um"),
2123                ),
2124                width_um=cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("width_um"),
2125                height_um=cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("height_um"),
2126                depth_um=cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("depth_um"),
2127                scan_direction=tbt.FIBPatternScanDirection(
2128                    cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("scan_direction")
2129                ),
2130                scan_type=tbt.FIBPatternScanType(
2131                    cleaning_cross_section_settings.get("scan_type")
2132                ),
2133            ),
2134        )
2135        return pattern
2136    elif pattern_type == tbt.FIBPatternType.SELECTED_AREA:
2137        validate_fib_selected_area_settings(
2138            settings=selected_area_settings,
2139            yml_format=yml_format,
2140            step_name=step_name,
2141            pattern_type=pattern_type,
2142        )
2143        pattern = tbt.FIBPattern(
2144            application=tbt.FIBApplication(application_file),
2145            type=pattern_type,
2146            geometry=tbt.FIBStreamPattern(
2147                dwell_us=selected_area_settings.get("dwell_us"),
2148                repeats=selected_area_settings.get("repeats"),
2149                recipe=Path(selected_area_settings.get("recipe_file")),
2150                mask=Path(selected_area_settings.get("mask_file")),
2151            ),
2152        )
2153        return pattern
2154    else:
2155        raise KeyError(
2156            f"Invalid pattern type of {pattern_type}. Supported pattern types are: {[i.value for i in tbt.FIBPatternType]}"
2157        )

Schema checking for fib pattern setting dictionary, format specified by yml_format

def validate_fib_box_settings( settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str, pattern_type: pytribeam.types.FIBPatternType) -> bool: 
2160def validate_fib_box_settings(
2161    settings: dict,
2162    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
2163    step_name: str,
2164    pattern_type: tbt.FIBPatternType,
2165) -> bool:
2166    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
2167        # flattens nested dictionary, adding "_" separator
2168        flat_settings = ut._flatten(settings)
2169        schema = Schema(
2170            {
2171                "center_x_um": And(
2172                    float,
2173                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'x_um' parameter for pattern 'center' sub-dictionary must be a float. '{flat_settings['center_x_um']}' of type '{type(flat_settings['center_x_um'])}' was requested.",
2174                ),
2175                "center_y_um": And(
2176                    float,
2177                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'y_um' parameter for pattern 'center' sub-dictionary must be a float. '{flat_settings['center_y_um']}' of type '{type(flat_settings['center_y_um'])}' was requested.",
2178                ),
2179                "width_um": And(
2180                    float,
2181                    lambda x: x > 0,
2182                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'width_um' parameter must be a float. '{flat_settings['width_um']}' of type '{type(flat_settings['width_um'])}' was requested.",
2183                ),
2184                "height_um": And(
2185                    float,
2186                    lambda x: x > 0,
2187                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'height_um' parameter must be a float. '{flat_settings['height_um']}' of type '{type(flat_settings['height_um'])}' was requested.",
2188                ),
2189                "depth_um": And(
2190                    float,
2191                    lambda x: x > 0,
2192                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'depth_um' parameter must be a float. '{flat_settings['depth_um']}' of type '{type(flat_settings['depth_um'])}' was requested.",
2193                ),
2194                "scan_direction": And(
2195                    str,
2196                    lambda x: ut.valid_enum_entry(x, tbt.FIBPatternScanDirection),
2197                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'scan_direction' parameter must be a valid scan direction type. '{flat_settings['scan_direction']}' was requested but supported values are: {[i.value for i in tbt.FIBPatternScanDirection]}",
2198                ),
2199                "scan_type": And(
2200                    str,
2201                    lambda x: ut.valid_enum_entry(x, tbt.FIBPatternScanType),
2202                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'scan_type' parameter must be a valid scan type type. '{flat_settings['scan_type']}' was requested but supported values are: {[i.value for i in tbt.FIBPatternScanType]}",
2203                ),
2204            },
2205            ignore_extra_keys=True,
2206        )
2207    try:
2208        schema.validate(flat_settings)
2209    except UnboundLocalError:
2210        raise ValueError(
2211            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
2212        )
2213    return True
def validate_fib_selected_area_settings( settings: dict, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion, step_name: str, pattern_type: pytribeam.types.FIBPatternType) -> bool: 
2216def validate_fib_selected_area_settings(
2217    settings: dict,
2218    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
2219    step_name: str,
2220    pattern_type: tbt.FIBPatternType,
2221) -> bool:
2222    if yml_format.version >= 1.0:
2223        schema = Schema(
2224            {
2225                "dwell_us": And(
2226                    float,
2227                    lambda x: x > 0,
2228                    # check all float error versions of modulus
2229                    Or(
2230                        lambda x: math.isclose(
2231                            x % Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us,
2232                            0,
2233                            abs_tol=Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us / 1e5,
2234                        ),
2235                        lambda x: math.isclose(
2236                            x % Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us,
2237                            Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us,
2238                            abs_tol=Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us / 1e5,
2239                        ),
2240                        lambda x: math.isclose(
2241                            x % Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us,
2242                            -Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us,
2243                            abs_tol=Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us / 1e5,
2244                        ),
2245                    ),
2246                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'dwell_us' parameter must be a positive float and an integer multiple of the base dwell time, { Constants.stream_pattern_base_dwell_us * Conversions.US_TO_NS} ns. '{settings['dwell_us']}' us of type '{type(settings['dwell_us'])}' was requested.",
2247                ),
2248                "repeats": And(
2249                    int,
2250                    lambda x: x > 0,
2251                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'repeats' parameter must be a positive integer. '{settings['repeats']}' of type '{type(settings['repeats'])}' was requested.",
2252                ),
2253                "recipe_file": And(
2254                    str,
2255                    lambda x: Path(x).is_file(),
2256                    lambda x: Path(x).suffix == ".py",
2257                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'recipe_file' parameter must be a valid file path string with the extension '.py' and must already exist. The recipe file '{settings['recipe_file']}' was requested.",
2258                ),
2259                "mask_file": And(
2260                    str,
2261                    lambda x: Path(x).suffix == ".tif",
2262                    error=f"In 'fib' step_type for step '{step_name}' and pattern type '{pattern_type.value}', 'mask' parameter must be a file path string with a file extension of '.tif'. '{settings['mask_file']}' of type '{type(settings['mask_file'])}' was requested.",
2263                ),
2264            },
2265            ignore_extra_keys=True,
2266        )
2267    try:
2268        schema.validate(settings)
2269    except UnboundLocalError:
2270        raise ValueError(
2271            f"Error. Unsupported yml version {yml_format.version} provided."
2272        )
2273    return True
def step( microscope: pytribeam.types.Microscope, step_name: str, step_settings: dict, general_settings: pytribeam.types.GeneralSettings, yml_format: pytribeam.types.YMLFormatVersion) -> pytribeam.types.Step: 
2276def step(
2277    microscope: tbt.Microscope,
2278    # slice_number: str,
2279    step_name: str,
2280    step_settings: dict,
2281    general_settings: tbt.GeneralSettings,
2282    yml_format: tbt.YMLFormatVersion,
2283) -> tbt.Step:
2284    """Create step object for different step types, including validation."""
2285
2286    # parsing settings
2287    step_type_value = step_settings[yml_format.step_general_key][
2288        yml_format.step_type_key
2289    ]
2290    if not ut.valid_enum_entry(step_type_value, tbt.StepType):
2291        raise NotImplementedError(
2292            f"Unsupported step type of '{step_type_value}', for step name '{step_name}' supported types are: {[i.value for i in tbt.StepType]}."
2293        )
2294    step_type = tbt.StepType(step_type_value)
2295
2296    step_number = step_settings[yml_format.step_general_key][yml_format.step_number_key]
2297    if not isinstance(step_number, int) or (step_number < 1):
2298        raise KeyError(
2299            f"Invalid step number of '{step_number}', for step name '{step_name}'. Must be a positive integer greater than 0."
2300        )
2301    step_frequency = step_settings[yml_format.step_general_key][
2302        yml_format.step_frequency_key
2303    ]
2304    if not isinstance(step_frequency, int) or (step_frequency < 1):
2305        raise KeyError(
2306            f"Invalid step frequency of '{step_frequency}', for step name '{step_name}'. Must be a positive integer greater than 0."
2307        )
2308    stage_db = step_settings[yml_format.step_general_key][
2309        yml_format.step_stage_settings_key
2310    ]
2311
2312    # check and validate stage
2313    stage_settings = stage_position_settings(
2314        microscope=microscope,
2315        step_name=step_name,
2316        general_settings=general_settings,
2317        step_stage_settings=stage_db,
2318        yml_format=yml_format,
2319    )
2320
2321    # TODO
2322    # operation_settings, could use match statement in python >= 3.10
2323    if step_type == tbt.StepType.EBSD:
2324        operation_settings = ebsd(
2325            microscope=microscope,
2326            step_settings=step_settings,
2327            step_name=step_name,
2328            yml_format=yml_format,
2329        )
2330    if step_type == tbt.StepType.EDS:
2331        operation_settings = eds(
2332            microscope=microscope,
2333            step_settings=step_settings,
2334            step_name=step_name,
2335            yml_format=yml_format,
2336        )
2337    if step_type == tbt.StepType.IMAGE:
2338        operation_settings = image(
2339            microscope=microscope,
2340            step_settings=step_settings,
2341            step_name=step_name,
2342            yml_format=yml_format,
2343        )
2344    if step_type == tbt.StepType.LASER:
2345        operation_settings = laser(
2346            microscope=microscope,
2347            step_settings=step_settings,
2348            step_name=step_name,
2349            yml_format=yml_format,
2350        )
2351    if step_type == tbt.StepType.CUSTOM:
2352        operation_settings = custom(
2353            microscope=microscope,
2354            step_settings=step_settings,
2355            step_name=step_name,
2356            yml_format=yml_format,
2357        )
2358    if step_type == tbt.StepType.FIB:
2359        operation_settings = fib(
2360            microscope=microscope,
2361            step_settings=step_settings,
2362            step_name=step_name,
2363            yml_format=yml_format,
2364        )
2365
2366    step_object = tbt.Step(
2367        type=step_type,
2368        name=step_name,
2369        number=step_number,
2370        frequency=step_frequency,
2371        stage=stage_settings,
2372        operation_settings=operation_settings,
2373    )
2374
2375    return step_object

Create step object for different step types, including validation.
